name: Warren Democrats
subject: Right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Right now, we're hard at work making phone calls, sending texts, and getting out the early vote to make sure we elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country. But we're also up against one last gr | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525114/45c30650/1c7bed469/66eb5bdb/971171284/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're in the home stretch of the most important election of our lifetimes.

This is our last chance to make a difference and make sure we elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot. That's the only way we'll be able to recover from this pandemic and economic crisis, and put our country back on track.

So right now, we're hard at work making phone calls, sending texts, and getting out the early vote to make sure we elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country.

**But we're also up against one last grassroots fundraising goal before Election Day, and we need one final boost to reach our goal before our final deadline.**

**[If you're in a place to make a donation, please chip in $2 or whatever you can-- it would make a real difference in these make-or-break final days before the election.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525114/45c30650/1c7bed469/66eb5bda/971171284/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjFGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW21F_EOM_GOL_C_20201030_V1S1_P")**

Everything is at stake, and everything is on the ballot. You name it: Health care. Jobs. Student loan debt. Social Security. Criminal justice reform. Common-sense gun reform. Climate change. The survival of our very democracy. Whether government works for working people, or only for giant corporations and billionaires.

Elizabeth always says that elections like this are a chance to send leaders to Washington who will work to build a future, not just for the wealthy and the powerful, but for everyone.

We're all in this together. When we fight shoulder to shoulder, we're a grassroots army -- strong, proud, and unbeatable.

**In the next few days, volunteers will keep volunteering across the whole country. Their energy could carry Democrats over the finish line in neck-and-neck races. And if we reach our goal, we'll be able to keep going all out to help those terrific Democrats win.**

**[Will you chip in before our October 31 deadline? Every donation brings this team closer to our final goal of the election.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525114/45c30650/1c7bed469/66eb5bda/971171284/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjFGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW21F_EOM_GOL_C_20201030_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525114/45c30650/1c7bed469/66eb5bda/971171284/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjFGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW21F_EOM_GOL_C_20201030_V1S1_P")

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fighting For Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We've now reached the final day of early voting, and we wanted to share with
you one more of the many reasons to vote for Wesley Hunt. Put simply, Wesley
will always fight for Houston.

Now, more than ever, Houston needs an advocate who will put our interests
first. We need a leader who will lead us beyond the coronavirus pandemic,
defend our energy jobs, improve our healthcare system, and keep our city safe.
And with his track record of service and his commitment to the people of Texas,
it is clear that Wesley is the best person for the job.

Americans around the country will send a total of 435 Congressional
Representatives to Washington to fight for their interests; it is critical that
we elect a representative who will cater to the unique needs of Texas' 7th
Congressional District. From the first moment Wesley stepped foot on the campus
of West Point and throughout his three tours of duty to the Middle East, Wesley
has lived his commitment to service. And we know that this same ethos of
selfless sacrifice will define his leadership in the halls of Congress.

Unfortunately, Representative Lizzie Fletcher's tenure in Washington has left
the 7th District without an advocate. We've seen the shortcomings of her
leadership not only through her votes on the House floor, but through her
refusal to take action when Houston has needed her most.

Congresswoman Fletcher has failed our oil and gas industry during the
Coronavirus by allowing Nancy Pelosi to prevent Houston from receiving much
needed relief and even voting to allocate billions of dollars to Green New Deal
projects while Houston's energy industry struggled. Congresswoman Fletcher
failed our law enforcement officers by refusing Governor Abbott's Back the Blue
Pledge and cosponsoring legislation that makes it more difficult for officers
to protect our communities. Congresswoman Fletcher even failed to protect us
from future flooding by failing to push forward the much needed infrastructure
projects that would keep water in our bayous and reservoirs instead of our
streets and homes.

And most importantly, Congresswoman Fletcher failed to live up to her 2018
promise to be a moderate and work across the aisle. Instead, she's voted with
Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time.

As you head to the polls, we hope you will keep in mind that the best
candidate to fight for our interests in Washington is Wesley Hunt. Wesley has
put his life on the line to defend our values and way of life, and we can be
sure he will overcome any obstacle to fight for the 7th District in Congress.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Friend, We've now reached the final day of early voting, and we wanted to share with you one more of the many reasons to vote for Wesley Hunt. Put simply, Wesley will always fight for Houston. Now, more than ever, Houston needs an advocate who will put our interests first. We need a leader who will lead us beyond the coronavirus pandemic, defend our energy jobs, improve our healthcare system, and keep our city safe. And with his track record of service and his commitment to the people of Texas, it is clear that Wesley is the best person for the job. Americans around the country will send a total of 435 Congressional Representatives to Washington to fight for their interests; it is critical that we elect a representative who will cater to the unique needs of Texas' 7th Congressional District. From the first moment Wesley stepped foot on the campus of West Point and throughout his three tours of duty to the Middle East, Wesley has lived his commitment to service. And we know that this same ethos of selfless sacrifice will define his leadership in the halls of Congress. Unfortunately, Representative Lizzie Fletcher's tenure in Washington has left the 7th District without an advocate. We've seen the shortcomings of her leadership not only through her votes on the House floor, but through her refusal to take action when Houston has needed her most. Congresswoman Fletcher has failed our oil and gas industry during the Coronavirus by allowing Nancy Pelosi to prevent Houston from receiving much needed relief and even voting to allocate billions of dollars to Green New Deal projects while Houston's energy industry struggled. Congresswoman Fletcher failed our law enforcement officers by refusing Governor Abbott's Back the Blue Pledge and cosponsoring legislation that makes it more difficult for officers to protect our communities. Congresswoman Fletcher even failed to protect us from future flooding by failing to push forward the much needed infrastructure projects that would keep water in our bayous and reservoirs instead of our streets and homes. And most importantly, Congresswoman Fletcher failed to live up to her 2018 promise to be a moderate and work across the aisle. Instead, she's voted with Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time. As you head to the polls, we hope you will keep in mind that the best candidate to fight for our interests in Washington is Wesley Hunt. Wesley has put his life on the line to defend our values and way of life, and we can be sure he will overcome any obstacle to fight for the 7th District in Congress. Thank you, Team Hunt Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: New Biden Corruption Documents!
body:
Judicial Watch Book Hits Best Seller Lists!

[Advertisement]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=19477&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaGJvb2suY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAzMTAyMjM0Nw==]

[WEEKLY UPDATE]

JUSTICE AMY CONEY BARRETT CONFIRMATION A VICTORY FOR THE U.S.
CONSTITUTION

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21082&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj14STFxZThtQWUxayZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDMxMDIyMzQ3]

Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation as a United States Supreme
Court justice is a great victory for the U.S. Constitution. It is
another great victory for constitutional government. Most Americans
agree with Justice Barrett that the Supreme Court should apply the law
as it is written and leave the legislating to the people’s elected
representatives.

We are grateful that the Senate rejected the leftist attacks on
Justice Barrett and moved to solidify a conservative majority on the
Supreme Court. As she testified at her confirmation hearings, Justice
Barrett rejected the idea that judges should be political activists:

I interpret the Constitution as a law, that I interpret its text as
text and I understand it to have the meaning that it had at the time
people ratified it. So that meaning doesn’t change over time. And
it’s not up to me to update it or infuse my own policy views into
it.

As an immediate priority, Justice Barrett and the rest of Supreme
Court should reject the Left’s desperate efforts to use the courts
to undermine election security and rig the elections. For this reason,
I was disappointed to see that she declined to participate in two
major emergency election integrity cases this week out of North
Carolina and Pennsylvania. But it is a long ballgame, and we should
expect great things from the newest justice.

BIDEN ‘UNMASKED’ GENERAL FLYNN – JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR ANSWERS

Joe Biden was a busy boy in the waning days of the Obama
administration. While he and son Hunter were extorting Ukraine and
China, he was also lending a hand to the Obama lieutenants trying to
undo President Trump’s election.

We have filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the
National Security Agency (NSA) for records of requests by former Vice
President Joe Biden and other top Obama administration officials,
including President Obama’s chief of staff, to “unmask”
Lieutenant General (Retired) Michael Flynn (_Judicial Watch v.
National Security Agency_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21073&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbnNhLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzA4OC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMzEwMjIzNDc=]
(No. 1:20-cv-03088)).

The term “unmasking” refers to the practice of disclosing to
political appointees the identities of U.S. citizens referenced in
intelligence surveillance of foreign nationals. U.S. citizens’ names
are typically redacted from such reports unless a specific request is
made to “unmask” them.

We sued after the NSA failed to respond to two separate September 1,
2020, FOIA requests.

NEW STRZOK-PAGE EMAILS SHOW ‘MISSING’ MEETING ENTRIES

The FBI officials responsible for the unprecedented abuse of President
Trump keeps on magically losing documents.

We just received 163 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21011&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXN0cnpvay1wYWdlLWVtYWlsLXByb2QtMjYtMDAxNTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDMxMDIyMzQ3]
of emails between former FBI official Peter Strzok and former FBI
attorney Lisa Page. The records show that Microsoft Outlook’s
exchange server had to recreate multiple meetings that were
“missing” from Lisa Page’s initial calendar entries. These
missing meetings included the subjects “Going Dark Strategy
Meeting,” “Twitter,” and “702 Reauthorization Strategy
Coordination Bi-Weekly.”

We received the records in response to our January 2018 Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=16409&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy10ZXh0LW1lc3NhZ2VzLWZiaXMtc3Ryem9rLXBhZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDMxMDIyMzQ3]
filed after the DOJ failed to respond to a December 2017 request for

OVERWHELMING MAJORITY OF MS-13 DEFENDANTS ARE IN U.S. ILLEGALLY

When you hear the terms “border wall” or “open borders” you
should think of the criminal activity the former seeks to prevent and
the latter has permitted. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog has
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21052&F=T&]
the latest.

Sticking to its commitment of dismantling the nation’s deadliest
street gang, the Trump administration has criminally charged 127
members of the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) this year and
half a dozen face life in prison after being convicted. It’s a start
but, shockingly, it barely puts a dent on the problem since the MS-13
has an estimated 10,000 members in the U.S. and tens of thousands more
abroad, according to Department of Justice (DOJ) figures. Back in 2012
the Obama administration issued sanctions
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21083&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJlYXN1cnkuZ292L3ByZXNzLWNlbnRlci9wcmVzcy1yZWxlYXNlcy9QYWdlcy90ZzE3MzMuYXNweD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAzMTAyMjM0Nw==]
against the MS-13, officially classifying the Latin American gang as a
Transitional Criminal Organization (TCO) for its involvement in
serious criminal activities, including drug trafficking, kidnapping,
human smuggling, sex trafficking, murder, racketeering, blackmail,
extortion and immigration offenses.

MS-13 has long operated in the U.S., but it was Obama’s open border
policies that energized the international gang domestically with new
recruits provided by a steady flow of illegal immigrant minors. In
fact, the DOJ reveals that around 74% of MS-13 defendants prosecuted
by the agency in the last four years are in the U.S. illegally. Lax
immigration enforcement is largely responsible. When the Obama
administration started welcoming a barrage of Unaccompanied Alien
Children (UAC) in 2014, Homeland Security sources told Judicial Watch
that the nation’s most violent street gangs—including MS-13 and
the 18th Street gang—were actively recruiting
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=8153&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDE0LzA3L21zLTEzLWFjdGl2ZWx5LXJlY3J1aXRpbmctaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbi1taW5vcnMtdS1zLXNoZWx0ZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAzMTAyMjM0Nw==]
new members at U.S. shelters housing the minors. The Texas Department
of Public Safety subsequently confirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=8154&F=T&]
that the MS-13 is a top tier gang thanks to the influx of illegal
alien gang members that crossed into the state under Obama’s
disastrous program, which saw over 60,000 illegal immigrants—many
with criminal histories—storm into the U.S. in a matter of months.
Tens of thousands more have entered since then.

When Donald Trump became president he issued an Executive Order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=19710&F=T&]
directing several agencies, including the departments of Justice,
State and Homeland Security, to coordinate an effort to restore safety
for the American people by extinguishing TCOs such as MS-13. The order
states that the criminal groups have spread throughout the nation,
threatening the safety of the United States and its citizens. “These
organizations derive revenue through widespread illegal conduct,
including acts of violence and abuse that exhibit a wanton disregard
for human life,” the president’s order reads. “They, for
example, have been known to commit brutal murders, rapes, and other
barbaric acts. These groups are drivers of crime, corruption,
violence, and misery.” The commander-in-chief gives federal agencies
120 days to report progress in combating the criminal organizations as
well as recommended actions for dismantling them. In August 2019
Attorney General William Barr launched an initiative known as Joint
Task Force Vulcan (JTFV) to address MS-13 with a coordinated force of
federal law enforcement agencies and the DOJ. Less than a year after
its formation, the task force recorded big successes. Over the summer
the DOJ announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=19711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2RlcGFydG1lbnQtanVzdGljZS1hbm5vdW5jZXMtdGFrZWRvd24ta2V5LW1zLTEzLWNyaW1pbmFsLWxlYWRlcnNoaXA/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMzEwMjIzNDc=]
a number of significant JTFV cases, including for the first time an
MS-13 member being charged with terrorism-related offenses, the take
down of the MS-13 Hollywood leadership and the Attorney General’s
decision to seek the death penalty against an MS-13 operative.

This month the DOJ released a report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51915&L=21084&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvYWcvcGFnZS9maWxlLzEzMjk3NzYvZG93bmxvYWQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMzEwMjIzNDc=]
documenting
the government’s achievements in pursuing MS-13 members nationwide.
Since fiscal year 2016, the agency has charged 749 MS-13 defendants
and obtained 504 convictions, including 37 life sentences. In 2020
federal prosecutors have charged 127 MS-13 gang bangers with six
facing life sentences after being convicted. Additionally, the DOJ is
seeking the death penalty in two MS-13 cases, in New York and
Virginia. The feds will keep at it because MS-13 is a barbaric and
well-organized criminal enterprise that continues to intensify in the
U.S. and internationally. “For decades, MS-13 has exploited
weaknesses in U.S. immigration enforcement policies to move its
members in and out of the United States and to recruit new members who
have arrived in the United States illegally,” the DOJ writes in its
recently issued report. “MS-13 recruited and utilized foreign
nationals, most often from Central America, who were in the United
States illegally.” A tiny portion, around three percent, of MS-13
criminal defendants are in the country legally, according to DOJ
figures.

In this book I identify four major forces posing a continued threat to

DEEP STATE EFFORTS TO DESTROY THE TRUMP PRESIDENCY: How the Democratic

and DOJ to dupe the FISA Court to allow it to spy on the Trump

exploding across America, and how our nation’s sovereignty has been
under assault by radical open-border advocates.

Subversive Deep State collaborators with ties to the Clinton and Obama
machines not only launched countless—often illegal—operations to

Constitution, believes the United States must have clearly defined and
protected borders, believes in the need for a strong military,
believes in the value of hard work and faith, and believes in the rule
of law and American exceptionalism.

clean_body: Judicial Watch Book Hits Best Seller Lists! [Advertisement] [==] [WEEKLY UPDATE] JUSTICE AMY CONEY BARRETT CONFIRMATION A VICTORY FOR THE U.S. CONSTITUTION [] Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation as a United States Supreme Court justice is a great victory for the U.S. Constitution. It is another great victory for constitutional government. Most Americans agree with Justice Barrett that the Supreme Court should apply the law as it is written and leave the legislating to the people’s elected representatives. We are grateful that the Senate rejected the leftist attacks on Justice Barrett and moved to solidify a conservative majority on the Supreme Court. As she testified at her confirmation hearings, Justice Barrett rejected the idea that judges should be political activists: I interpret the Constitution as a law, that I interpret its text as text and I understand it to have the meaning that it had at the time people ratified it. So that meaning doesn’t change over time. And it’s not up to me to update it or infuse my own policy views into it. As an immediate priority, Justice Barrett and the rest of Supreme Court should reject the Left’s desperate efforts to use the courts to undermine election security and rig the elections. For this reason, I was disappointed to see that she declined to participate in two major emergency election integrity cases this week out of North Carolina and Pennsylvania. But it is a long ballgame, and we should expect great things from the newest justice. BIDEN ‘UNMASKED’ GENERAL FLYNN – JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR ANSWERS Joe Biden was a busy boy in the waning days of the Obama administration. While he and son Hunter were extorting Ukraine and China, he was also lending a hand to the Obama lieutenants trying to undo President Trump’s election. We have filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the National Security Agency (NSA) for records of requests by former Vice President Joe Biden and other top Obama administration officials, including President Obama’s chief of staff, to “unmask” Lieutenant General (Retired) Michael Flynn (Judicial Watch v. National Security Agency [=] (No. 1:20-cv-03088)). The term “unmasking” refers to the practice of disclosing to political appointees the identities of U.S. citizens referenced in intelligence surveillance of foreign nationals. U.S. citizens’ names are typically redacted from such reports unless a specific request is made to “unmask” them. We sued after the NSA failed to respond to two separate September 1, 2020, FOIA requests. The first request seeks “records about a January 12, 2017, request to ‘unmask’ Lieutenant General Flynn submitted to NSA by or on behalf of then-Vice President Joe Biden.” The second request asks for “records about requests to ‘unmask’ Lieutenant General Flynn submitted to NSA by or on behalf of the following officials on the dates or date ranges indicated: Samantha Powers - Nov. 30, 2016 to Jan. 11, 2017 James Clapper - Dec. 2, 2016 to Jan. 7, 2017 Kelly Degnan – Dec. 6, 2016 John R. Phillips – Dec. 6, 2016 John Brennan – Dec. 14 & 15, 2016 Patrick Conlon – Dec. 14, 2016 Jacob Lew – Dec. 14 & 15, 2016 Arthur McGlynn – Dec. 14, 2016 Mike Neufeld – Dec. 14, 2016 Sarah Raskin – Dec. 14, 2016 Nathan Sheets – Dec. 14, 2016 Adam Szubin – Dec. 14, 2016 Robert Bell – Dec. 15, 2016 John Christenson – Dec. 15, 2016 Sarah Raskin – Dec. 15, 2016 Nathan Sheets – Dec. 15, 2016 Adam Szubin – Dec. 15, 2016 Robert Bell – Dec. 15, 2016 John Christenson – Dec. 15, 2016 James Comey – Dec. 15, 2016 Paul Geehreng – Dec. 15, 2016 Douglas Lute – Dec. 15, 2016 James Hursh – Dec. 15, 2016 Lee Litzenberger – Dec. 15, 2016 Scott Parrish – Dec. 15, 2016 Elizabeth Sherwood-Randall – Dec. 15, 2016 Tamir Waser – Dec. 15, 2016 John Tefft – Dec. 16, 2016 John Bass – Dec. 28, 2016 Denis McDonough – Jan. 5, 2017 Michael Dempsy – Jan. 7, 2017 Stephanie O’Sullivan – Jan. 7, 2017 The Deputy Assistant Director of the National Media Exploitation Center, whose name was not known - December 15, 2016 The names of officials and dates identified in the FOIA requests were taken directly from a list [==] which was declassified on May 8, 2020, by then-Acting Director of National Intelligence Richard Grenell and submitted to Senators Charles Grassley and Ron Johnson on May 13. On May 19, Senator Grassley responded [==] and asked for “the declassification of additional information related to the unmasking of Americans around the time of the 2016 election, but also to expand the scope of our request to include information as early as January 2016. Based on our investigation and recent press reports, we are increasingly concerned that the surveillance of U.S. persons affiliated with the Trump campaign began earlier than the opening of the FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation in late July 2016.” The requests by Joe Biden and President Obama’s chief of staff to unmask the identity of President Trump’s top national security adviser reek of corruption and abuse. The documents about this illicit spy operation should be released immediately. And we will continue this battle no matter the election results next week! BURISMA LOBBYING FIRM TIED TO DEMOCRATS MET WITH U.S. OFFICIALS We now know that the anti-Trump State Department knew about the shady Biden-Burisma connections and were desperate to monitor Biden’s conservative critics. This revelation comes in 116 pages [==] of records from the State Department that include a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations [)]. The briefing checklist notes that Painter also planned to meet [] with Foreign Commercial Service (FCS) Officer Martin Claessens “regarding the Burisma Group energy company.” (Painter was implicated in the Clinton-era fundraising scandal [=] we exposed that involved the alleged sale of seats on Commerce Department trade missions to Democratic National Committee donors.) We received the records in response to our FOIA lawsuit [=] in January 2020 seeking records of communications from the U.S. Embassy in Kyiv mentioning Burisma (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:20-cv-00229)). At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden, son of former Vice President Joe Biden, was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian energy firm. Hunter Biden served on the board of Burisma until April 2019 [=]. The records we obtained also include a May 18, 2016, email [] from a redacted sender to Amos Hochstein, senior advisor to Vice President Joe Biden on international energy affairs, under the subject “Burisma News Devon Archer.” The email includes links to two articles, one by the New York Post [ on May 12, 2016, which detail how Archer, a business partner of Hunter Biden and also a member of the Burisma board of directors, had been arrested on suspicion of securities fraud in a “$60 million scam that ripped off impoverished South Dakota Sioux and others.” The records also include several emails [] in which officials in the U.S. Embassy in Kyiv closely monitored media and social media reaction to John Solomon’s reporting [==] for The Hill on Yovanovitch and Ukraine corruption. Individuals whose statements were flagged included Dan Bongino, Sean Hannity, Rush Limbaugh, Jack Posobiec, and Rudy Giuliani, as well as Ukrainian journalists and politicians. A March 23, 2019, email [=] from a redacted sender to several Kyiv embassy officials, including Yovanovitch and Acting Deputy Chief of Mission George Kent, cites a Dan Bongino tweet reacting to Solomon’s reporting. The email reads: “Host of the Dan Bongino Podcast and Fox News Contributor Dan Bongino (with nearly a million Twitter followers) tweeted about 20-30 minutes ago (in a string of separate tweets): They knew, The entire time. #MediaBias Marie Yovanovitch George Kent Yuriy Lutsenko Scrhiy Leshchenko Fusion GPS Joe Biden Hunter Biden Burisma Devon Archer The most important piece you can read today: “Top Ukrainian justice official says US ambassador gave him a do-not prosecute list” (link to earlier Hill article) I’ll explain more on my show Monday. A March 22, 2019, email [==] from a redacted sender to several Kyiv embassy officials, including Yovanovitch and Kent, notes: “@JackPosobiec of One America News Network (with about 440 thousand followers) tweeted about 15 minutes ago: “U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Maria (sic) Yovanovitch, an Obama holdover, has told U.S. Embassy employees and Ukrainian officials that they need not pay attention to Trump since he is going to be impeached.” The email continues: “(This appears to be in the line stated by (Joe) DiGenova on the air with Hannity a couple days ago; just flagging that it is being recirculated now by a Twitter user with a large number of followers, in case it leads to new press inquiries in DC, etc).” A March 22, 2019, email [==] from a redacted sender to sender to several Kyiv embassy officials, including Yovanovitch and Kent, cites a tweet from Giuliani: “See tweet below from Rudy Giuliani, directing people to content released by Dan Bongino (host of The Dan Bongino Podcast and a Fox News Contributor, per his Twitter profile). The Dan Bongino video is an hour long, I’ll try to skim through and get key points now....” The email then quotes the tweet in which Giuliani writes: “Pay attention to @dbongino for an analysis of some real collusion between Hillary, Kerry and Biden people colluding with Ukrainian operatives to make money and affect 2016 election.” The email then cites a tweet in response to Giuliani’s in which Bongino writes: “Joe Biden is going to have A LOT of explaining to do regarding Ukraine. A LOT.” Here’s some context. The Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee on May 20, 2020, voted to subpoena [=] Blue Star Strategies as part of its investigation into Hunter Biden’s role on the Burisma board. Committee Chairman Ron Johnson (R-WI) is also seeking depositions from Painter and Blue Star CEO Karen Tramontano. Painter [=] was a senior adviser in the Clinton administration. The Wall Street Journal noted in an October 8, 2020, report [] that a federal appeals court reinstated the conviction of Archer on securities fraud and conspiracy charges, ruling a lower-court judge erred last year in vacating a jury’s verdict. Bevan Cooney, another a former business partner of Hunter Biden, was also convicted and in July 2019 was sentenced to 30 months in prison. Cooney was recently moved out of his jail cell in Oregon by federal agents for his protection after he provided emails and alleged Biden family corruption to Breitbart News, a, October 20, 2020, Breitbart report [] said. In September 2020, we uncovered State Department records [==] showing Russia-linked media “trolling” Joe Biden over “his son’s business.” In a related case, also in September, we made public records [=] we received from the State Department that confirmed our prior reporting that the Ukraine Embassy under then-Ambassador Marie Yovanovitch monitored, in potential violation of law, Donald Trump, Jr. Rudy Giuliani, and major journalists on Twitter on their commentary on Ukraine, “Biden-Burisma 2020”, and George Soros. The documents list the targeted such persons as Sean Hannity, Laura Ingraham, Rudy Giuliani, Dan Bongino, Sebastian Gorka, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, Ryan Saavedra, Sara A Carter, Donald Trump Jr., Michael McFaul, Lou Dobbs and Pamela Gellar. The search terms that were flagged to be monitored by State Department officials on social media included Yovanovitch, Ukraine Ambassador, Ukrainian Ambassador, Ukraine Soros, Clinton campaign, and Biden-Burisma. The emails show that Yovanovitch was aware [==] of the social media monitoring program. As you can see, one doesn’t need Hunter Biden’s laptop for evidence of Burisma/Biden corruption – the FOIA documents that Judicial Watch uncovered provide more than enough evidence for further inquiries by law enforcement NEW STRZOK-PAGE EMAILS SHOW ‘MISSING’ MEETING ENTRIES The FBI officials responsible for the unprecedented abuse of President Trump keeps on magically losing documents. We just received 163 pages [] of emails between former FBI official Peter Strzok and former FBI attorney Lisa Page. The records show that Microsoft Outlook’s exchange server had to recreate multiple meetings that were “missing” from Lisa Page’s initial calendar entries. These missing meetings included the subjects “Going Dark Strategy Meeting,” “Twitter,” and “702 Reauthorization Strategy Coordination Bi-Weekly.” We received the records in response to our January 2018 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] filed after the DOJ failed to respond to a December 2017 request for all communications between Strzok and Page (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [==] (No. 1:18-cv-00154)). The FBI is processing the records at a rate of only 500 pages per month and has refused to process text messages. At this rate, the production of these emails will not be completed until late 2021 at the earliest. Multiple meetings were “missing” from Lisa Page’s calendar and had the Microsoft Outlook message “Exchange Server re-created a meeting that was missing from your calendar.” These meetings include a December 15, 2017, meeting [==] that was recreated and has the subject, “Going Dark Strategy Meeting.” A December 7, 2017, meeting [==] was recreated that has the subject “Twitter” and the location listed as “SFHQ/Lync” [presumably SFHQ referring to San Francisco Headquarters and “Lync,” referring to the FBI’s internal messaging system known as Lync]. A July 10, 2017, meeting [==] was recreated that has the subject “702 Reauthorization Strategy Coordination Bi-Weekly.” An April 13, 2016, meeting [==] was recreated that has the subject “Investigative & Administrative Law Top Issues Update.” An April 14, 2016, meeting [==] with the subject “NSCLB Top Issues Update” was recreated. A July 10, 2017, meeting [==] was recreated that has the subject “702 Reauthorization Strategy Coordination Bi-Weekly.” A December 7, 2017, meeting [==] with a redacted title under exemptions b6 (personal privacy) and b7C-1 (related to law enforcement sources and methods) was recreated, as was a December 25, 2017, meeting [==] with the subject “702 Reauthorization Strategy Coordination Bi-Weekly.” On June 8, 2017, in an email [=] to Deputy Asst. Director Jon Moffa and Lisa Page (and an unidentified General Counsel office official), regarding watching James Comey testify before the Senate Intelligence Committee, Peter Strzok concluded his note with “[Redacted] sorry you have stupid NSA.” On June 10, 2017, Peter Strzok forwarded an email [==] to his boss, Asst. Director for Counterintelligence Bill Priestap, Page and General Counsel James Baker a New Yorker article that Strzok called “thoughtful,” titled “Trump vs. Comey: Hope Against Hope,” discussing the dispute between Comey and Trump about the contents of conversations the two had in private Oval Office discussions about Michael Flynn. How did the meeting entries go missing? Deleted calendar entries, wiped phones, missing text messages – all these disappearing records suggest that the FBI and DOJ are engaged in an unprecedented cover-up of their misconduct targeting President Trump. In a related case [=], we discovered in September that Robert Mueller’s Special Counsel’s Office repeatedly and “accidentally” wiped phones assigned to them. And our work exposing the Page-Strzok and attendant FBI coup corruption is second to none: In July 2020, we uncovered [=] emails showing Strzok, Page and other top bureau officials in the days prior to and following President Donald Trump’s inauguration discussing a White House counterintelligence briefing that could “play into” the FBI’s “investigative strategy.” In February 2020, we uncovered [=] an August 2016 email in which Strzok writes that Hillary Clinton, in her interview with the FBI about her email controversy, apologized for “the work and effort” it caused the bureau and she said she chose to use a non-state.gov email account “out of convenience” and that “it proved to be anything but.” Strzok said Clinton’s apology and the “convenience” discussion were “not in” the FBI 302 report that summarized the interview. Also in February, we made public Strzok-Page emails showing their direct involvement in the opening of Crossfire Hurricane, the bureau’s investigation of alleged collusion between the Trump campaign and Russia. The records also show additional “confirmed classified emails” were found on Clinton’s unsecure non-state.gov [] email server “beyond the number presented” in then-FBI Director James Comey’s statements; Strzok and Page questioning the access the DOJ was granting Clinton’s lawyers; and Page revealing that the DOJ was making edits to FBI 302 reports related to the Clinton Midyear Exam investigation. The emails detail a discussion about “squashing” an issue related to the Seth Rich controversy. In January 2020, we uncovered [=] Strzok-Page emails that detail special accommodations given to the lawyers of Clinton and her aides during the FBI investigation of the Clinton email controversy. In November 2019, we revealed [=] Strzok-Page emails that show the attorney representing three of Clinton’s aides were given meetings with senior FBI officials. Also in November, we uncovered [==] emails revealing that after Clinton’s statement denying the transmission of classified information over her unsecure email system, Strzok sent an email to FBI officials citing “three [Clinton email] chains” containing (C) [classified confidential] portion marks in front of paragraphs.” In a separate case, in May 2020, we received the “electronic communication [== (EC) that officially launched the counterintelligence investigation, termed “Crossfire Hurricane,” of President Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign. The document was written by former FBI official Peter Strzok. OVERWHELMING MAJORITY OF MS-13 DEFENDANTS ARE IN U.S. ILLEGALLY When you hear the terms “border wall” or “open borders” you should think of the criminal activity the former seeks to prevent and the latter has permitted. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has [] the latest. Sticking to its commitment of dismantling the nation’s deadliest street gang, the Trump administration has criminally charged 127 members of the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) this year and half a dozen face life in prison after being convicted. It’s a start but, shockingly, it barely puts a dent on the problem since the MS-13 has an estimated 10,000 members in the U.S. and tens of thousands more abroad, according to Department of Justice (DOJ) figures. Back in 2012 the Obama administration issued sanctions [==] against the MS-13, officially classifying the Latin American gang as a Transitional Criminal Organization (TCO) for its involvement in serious criminal activities, including drug trafficking, kidnapping, human smuggling, sex trafficking, murder, racketeering, blackmail, extortion and immigration offenses. MS-13 has long operated in the U.S., but it was Obama’s open border policies that energized the international gang domestically with new recruits provided by a steady flow of illegal immigrant minors. In fact, the DOJ reveals that around 74% of MS-13 defendants prosecuted by the agency in the last four years are in the U.S. illegally. Lax immigration enforcement is largely responsible. When the Obama administration started welcoming a barrage of Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) in 2014, Homeland Security sources told Judicial Watch that the nation’s most violent street gangs—including MS-13 and the 18th Street gang—were actively recruiting [==] new members at U.S. shelters housing the minors. The Texas Department of Public Safety subsequently confirmed [] that the MS-13 is a top tier gang thanks to the influx of illegal alien gang members that crossed into the state under Obama’s disastrous program, which saw over 60,000 illegal immigrants—many with criminal histories—storm into the U.S. in a matter of months. Tens of thousands more have entered since then. When Donald Trump became president he issued an Executive Order [==] directing several agencies, including the departments of Justice, State and Homeland Security, to coordinate an effort to restore safety for the American people by extinguishing TCOs such as MS-13. The order states that the criminal groups have spread throughout the nation, threatening the safety of the United States and its citizens. “These organizations derive revenue through widespread illegal conduct, including acts of violence and abuse that exhibit a wanton disregard for human life,” the president’s order reads. “They, for example, have been known to commit brutal murders, rapes, and other barbaric acts. These groups are drivers of crime, corruption, violence, and misery.” The commander-in-chief gives federal agencies 120 days to report progress in combating the criminal organizations as well as recommended actions for dismantling them. In August 2019 Attorney General William Barr launched an initiative known as Joint Task Force Vulcan (JTFV) to address MS-13 with a coordinated force of federal law enforcement agencies and the DOJ. Less than a year after its formation, the task force recorded big successes. Over the summer the DOJ announced [=] a number of significant JTFV cases, including for the first time an MS-13 member being charged with terrorism-related offenses, the take down of the MS-13 Hollywood leadership and the Attorney General’s decision to seek the death penalty against an MS-13 operative. This month the DOJ released a report [=] documenting the government’s achievements in pursuing MS-13 members nationwide. Since fiscal year 2016, the agency has charged 749 MS-13 defendants and obtained 504 convictions, including 37 life sentences. In 2020 federal prosecutors have charged 127 MS-13 gang bangers with six facing life sentences after being convicted. Additionally, the DOJ is seeking the death penalty in two MS-13 cases, in New York and Virginia. The feds will keep at it because MS-13 is a barbaric and well-organized criminal enterprise that continues to intensify in the U.S. and internationally. “For decades, MS-13 has exploited weaknesses in U.S. immigration enforcement policies to move its members in and out of the United States and to recruit new members who have arrived in the United States illegally,” the DOJ writes in its recently issued report. “MS-13 recruited and utilized foreign nationals, most often from Central America, who were in the United States illegally.” A tiny portion, around three percent, of MS-13 criminal defendants are in the country legally, according to DOJ figures. NEW JUDICIAL WATCH BOOK SET TO DEBUT ON NEW YORK TIMES BEST SELLER LIST! Exciting news! My latest Judicial Watch book, A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom, will debut at #12 on the New York Times [==] Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8. The book will also come in at #14 on the Times’s Combined Print and E-Book Best Sellers List. Additionally, A Republic Under Assault will debut at #2 on Publishers Weekly’s Top Hardcover Frontlist Nonfiction List and #4 on Publishers Weekly’s Overall Best Sellers List on November 2. The book has only been in bookstores nationwide since October 20. A Republic Under Assault is my third New York Times bestselling book. The first two bestselling Judicial Watch books, The Corruption Chronicles [] and Clean House [==], revealed what we have uncovered in our battles against Obama secrecy. A Republic Under Assault [==] is a hard-hitting, fast-paced look at how the Radical Left and the Deep State are trying to destroy the Trump presidency. I urge you to purchase this book immediately. Your buying the book now will help Judicial Watch, keep the book on the bestseller lists (increasing opportunities for other Americans to see and buy it), and you will annoy the left. You can buy the book at www.JudicialWatchBook.com []. I’m serious when I say this is the most important book you could read this year! In this book I identify four major forces posing a continued threat to American democracy: DEEP STATE EFFORTS TO DESTROY THE TRUMP PRESIDENCY: How the Democratic National Committee and the Clinton campaign paid for the fraudulent anti-Trump “Steele Dossier,” and how it was used by the Obama FBI and DOJ to dupe the FISA Court to allow it to spy on the Trump presidential campaign AND President Trump. These and more dirty secrets of Obamagate and the impeachment coup attempt are exposed. HILLARY CLINTON EMAIL SCANDAL: How the Clinton team and senior officials at the Obama State Department conspired to cover up Hillary Clinton’s secret email system—and shocking revelations that tie the Obama White House to the cover-up! VOTER FRAUD: How Soros-funded groups attack states that seek to protect clean elections by challenging voter ID laws, and how the Left is cynically peddling COVID-19 crisis electoral “reforms,” such as mail-in voting, which could increase voter fraud and election chaos. And shocking numbers about dirty voting rolls across the nation! ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION: How deadly illegal “sanctuary” policies are exploding across America, and how our nation’s sovereignty has been under assault by radical open-border advocates. Subversive Deep State collaborators with ties to the Clinton and Obama machines not only launched countless—often illegal—operations to stop and then remove Trump, but even more alarmingly, are working to transform the United States into something truly unrecognizable to all who believe in liberty and the rule of law. Today one of their main targets is President Donald J. Trump. Tomorrow it could be you and anyone who believes in the U.S. Constitution, believes the United States must have clearly defined and protected borders, believes in the need for a strong military, believes in the value of hard work and faith, and believes in the rule of law and American exceptionalism. Sean Hannity, was particularly gracious in his praise of our new book. Here’s his comment from our book cover: “When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch. A Republic Under Assault lays bare the condemning facts Judicial Watch continues to expose about ‘Obamagate,’ the Deep State’s seditious coup to bring down Donald Trump, and much more. This is must reading for every American who wants to save our nation,” said Sean Hannity, #1 New York Times bestselling author of Live Free or Die. Again, please help us keep the book on the bestseller lists with a purchase now, you can get your copy here [==]. Until next week... name: Daniel Gade
subject: Mark Warner’s desperate plea
body:
I can only imagine how much it cost him.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56740072:WEuDzDKN5:m:1:2202880964:68913BB0A8863C6D6F3134FC6400D1DF:r)
---
This is it, Peter.
---
Mark Warner took out an attack ad against me in one of the most **_expensive spots_** on television -- the World Series.
---
He's so afraid of our movement that he was willing to shell out nearly every dollar he has to slander us at a time when tens of thousands of Virginians were watching.
---
_And to think that just ten months ago, the Left thought this was a "safe seat."_
---
**We CAN beat Warner, but it won't happen unless we meet our FINAL ad-buy deadline of the election at 9:15 P.M. TONIGHT to get our own message out to every Virginia voter.**
---
[**Please make a contribution before our FINAL deadline at 9:15 P.M. TONIGHT to help us keep up our momentum while Mark Warner is running scared.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56740072:WEuDzDKN5:m:1:2202880964:68913BB0A8863C6D6F3134FC6400D1DF:r)

subject: We need Scott Fitzgerald in Congress

body:
I'm supporting Fitzgerald. I need you to join me! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xtduun-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xtduun-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,I'm emailing you because I need **your help, TODAY, **to make sure **Scott Fitzgerald **wins his election next week to join me in Congress!Take it from me, if you care about the future of our country and fighting the liberals in Congress,** we need your support right away! ** [Join Steve Scalise - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xtduun-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Steve Scalise - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xtduun-ahkdjtlkr-j/) As the **Republican Whip** , I know how important it is to have reliable, principled Conservatives in power in Washington. I know that Scott Fitzgerald is a fighter, and he knows what it takes to get results. We're going to need Conservative leaders like Scott for the battles ahead of us with **Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the Radical Left** pushing the **Green New Deal, Socialized healthcare, tax hikes** , and so much worse!I'm counting on YOU to make sure **Scott Fitzgerald** is exactly where we need him - _fighting for Wisconsin in Congress._**Can I count on you?** Congressman Steve Scalise
Republican Whip

• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.

| Peter,
Did you see this? Democrats are outpacing Republicans in mail-in voting in Florida!
This makes it absolutely vital that Trump supporters get out and VOTE. Today is the last day of early voting in Florida, so if you haven't cast your vote yet, get to the polls today.

| We cannot afford to lose this consequential election. It is critical that every patriot in Florida make their voice heard so we can avoid a Joe Biden and Kamala Harris presidency. Make sure to reach out to your family and friends to ensure that everyone has a plan to get to the polls.
We are in crunch time, which makes it absolutely vital that we continue reaching out to as many voters as possible until the polls close on Election Day. We urgently need your support, so can I count on you to rush in help today?

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: Democrat turnout outpacing Republicans in FL From: Gaetz Political Team <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Monday, October 26, 2020 at 3:56 PM

Peter,
We might have a little problem here in Florida. According to the current polls, Democrats are turning out at higher rates than Republicans during early mail-in voting and already have a lead.
The Democrats are spending big to turn out their voters, and it looks to be paying off. We urgently need to reach more of our Republican supporters and make sure they vote to keep Florida red. Will you help us out by contributing to our [get-out-the-vote operation?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KrpAb72B2B44xjwuJYkK7CRWXcO61cfJ6uMaTJ582uNh7Qn9E0v5HQnhVdeaEJNULulIH1_hqV-bYDgr-OPTdWiLao_vfYaHmmjJTKg9PL_5ujIpc2mDlzI0vrH50riYPlm1Ij23rI-f9djJLhEiQzDIDjb3FiOk2Ozynzg0SdpL00tS2HaXbFA270M74l1q&c=YnDt3LNJxWZj5-4ZkGzwlUuBBKZ666v64AXlJXEoWX9U-JAnraVVUQ==&ch=mduHLO0cjc5R6u3yfJz4MlTLkzJKRAfQqu42tekYmkGsW7fCWWh1Kg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, Did you see this? Democrats are outpacing Republicans in mail-in voting in Florida! This makes it absolutely vital that Trump supporters get out and VOTE. Today is the last day of early voting in Florida, so if you haven't cast your vote yet, get to the polls today. | | | == | We cannot afford to lose this consequential election. It is critical that every patriot in Florida make their voice heard so we can avoid a Joe Biden and Kamala Harris presidency. Make sure to reach out to your family and friends to ensure that everyone has a plan to get to the polls. We are in crunch time, which makes it absolutely vital that we continue reaching out to as many voters as possible until the polls close on Election Day. We urgently need your support, so can I count on you to rush in help today? | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for your continued support! Keep Fighting, | | Matt Gaetz \------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: Democrat turnout outpacing Republicans in FL From: Gaetz Political Team <mailto:info@mattgaetz.com> Date: Monday, October 26, 2020 at 3:56 PM Peter, We might have a little problem here in Florida. According to the current polls, Democrats are turning out at higher rates than Republicans during early mail-in voting and already have a lead. The Democrats are spending big to turn out their voters, and it looks to be paying off. We urgently need to reach more of our Republican supporters and make sure they vote to keep Florida red. Will you help us out by contributing to our == | | | == | == | We are in the final days of the campaign season, which means we are in crunch time. Early voting ended yesterday, team, and our state set a new record: _over 9 million Texans_ have already cast their ballots. **Now, we need to make sure that everyone who hasn’t voted gets to the polls on Tuesday — their one last chance to vote.** That’s why we’re busy getting out the vote all weekend. But if we’re going to succeed, we’ll need your help to secure the last resources we’ll need. And there’s no time like the present to chip into our campaign. Our final end-of-month deadline is at midnight tonight, just a few short hours away. **We still need to raise $1,926 before time runs out on this final end-of-month deadline. name: Mark Warren
subject: It all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?refcode=103120-1)
| | Friend, It's the last weekend before the election. All across the state, our voter turnout and outreach program is well-underway. Hundreds of volunteers, organizers, and candidates are making thousands of calls to get out the vote. **We have rapidly expanded our program and our opportunities to flip seats in recent weeks.** Will you help fund our final weekend and days of action by making a contribution to our campaign today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=103120-1) _ _ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=103120-1) _ _ [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=103120-1) _ _ [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=103120-1) _ _ [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=103120-1) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ **It all comes down to this.** Every dollar helps us reach our goal and will help even more candidates across the finish line on Tuesday. Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director Minnesota House DFL P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pel4eL2NEb_mPH9QEWPkitlJVJ9dgiJBdfiHOyEyyjQ=/cVVz2zdesLjQWaque2Jmvv7JDFN_-3VSsHWdq7oR9FU=?refcode=103120-1)

clean_body: | | Friend, It's the last weekend before the election. All across the state, our voter turnout and outreach program is well-underway. Hundreds of volunteers, organizers, and candidates are making thousands of calls to get out the vote. We have rapidly expanded our program and our opportunities to flip seats in recent weeks. Will you help fund our final weekend and days of action by making a contribution to our campaign today? If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. It all comes down to this. Every dollar helps us reach our goal and will help even more candidates across the finish line on Tuesday. Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director Minnesota House DFL P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program. Take advantage of this program before it is too late. | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. name: Mary Mancini
subject: raising hell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20halloween%20banner%20gif_1.gif]
‘Twas the year 2020, on ol’ hallows eve
with no tricks or treats thanks to COVID-19
We voted with masks, standing six feet apart
To take out the orange that glows in the dark
Trump replaced RBG with a little Trump parrot
Confirming the seat to extreme Amy Barret
The white house proclaimed that the virus was done
And praised all the poll watchers waving their guns
Which brings us full circle, even if just for spite
Will you make a donation, by midnight tonight?
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Asset%2038%403x.png]
Peter
It’s Halloween - 3 days before Election Day - and Tennessee Democratic candidates are running hard across the state and raising quite a bit of hell. They have mobilized Tennesseans like never before, upset the status quo, and have their opponents running scared.
That’s why we’re having a day-long Halloween Hellraiser! We have until midnight tonight to reach our October end-of-month goal and - BOO! - we’re $5,460 short. The election may be 3 days away, but the TNDP is here to stay and we need to have the resources to keep supporting our candidates and raising hell.
Democracy isn’t about one election. There is a long game and the TNDP is here to play it. So please, if you can, make a donation to the TNDP right now. And if you haven’t yet MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE!
Thank you,
[https://ci4.googleusercontent.com/proxy/ouK0kDauFTTbyjn2epkgHa4jlJXIvXKzFnCLBfUNkLdm-QepKKnYletMRxIcSaeCgdVOU7Y2hFloxRxw--pyiKHc2iY2NcVR7EQVFoIjYkmr2w3IeKNgNnydQ_-647M7uOoYew3h59jK0-c=s0-d-e1-ft#https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/TNDP%20Logo%20transparent%20250w.png]

Nashville, TN 37217
United States

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
Whatever happens in this election, we can be sure of one thing. Politics will still exist and the West Virginia Democratic Party isn’t planning on going anywhere anytime soon. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your help reaching our end of month goal. We have another $2,890 to raise by midnight tonight – can you help us get there?
The WVDP is in this for the long game, and we know West Virginia Democrats like you are too. We want to make sure we have the resources to continue the momentum our state party has seen this year. Will you make a donation right now and support us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: The Final Countdown!
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=288A642A20A2887)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | This truly is "The Final Countdown!" With just THREE DAYS left until Election Day, the entire world is anxiously awaiting the outcome.

This week on [Red White and True News](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=288A642A20A2908), we bring you more of the latest updates on citizen-led efforts to protect the integrity and security of our country’s most historic election. This podcast episode also reveals what True the Vote is doing to take action in Texas where we analyzed the data and found anomalies suggesting illegal voting in Texas Early Voting reports. [Check out our Texas data.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=288A642A20A2909)

We are taking on big data efforts and getting eyes on what's happening with the voter records in this election to identify who is voting more than once. We've started in Texas, and we're moving nationwide now that we've built the data engine. Our [Election Integrity Hotline](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=288A642A20A2889) is buzzing with calls coming in from all over the country! To be able to help citizens vote and take action on real issues with our voting system is the very purpose of why True the Vote exists. But right now, we need to be able to scale and stay in the fight past November 3.

[If you are moved to give, we need you now more than ever. This fight is far from over. True the Vote needs to keep scaling. Please visit our website to donate or become a recurring giver.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=288A642A20A2901)

Thank you to everyone who has supported us thus far!

Onward!

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | This truly is "The Final Countdown!" With just THREE DAYS left until Election Day, the entire world is anxiously awaiting the outcome. This week on , we bring you more of the latest updates on citizen-led efforts to protect the integrity and security of our country’s most historic election. This podcast episode also reveals what True the Vote is doing to take action in Texas where we analyzed the data and found anomalies suggesting illegal voting in Texas Early Voting reports. We are taking on big data efforts and getting eyes on what's happening with the voter records in this election to identify who is voting more than once. We've started in Texas, and we're moving nationwide now that we've built the data engine. Our is buzzing with calls coming in from all over the country! To be able to help citizens vote and take action on real issues with our voting system is the very purpose of why True the Vote exists. But right now, we need to be able to scale and stay in the fight past November 3. Thank you to everyone who has supported us thus far! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Dog-tired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
In the next few days, we're pitching in to support Warren Democrats in competitive races across the country. It's all powered by grassroots donors, and we need to hit our last goal by midnight tonight | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525117/45c30650/1c7ae3d0b/66eb5a8d/1951194392/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'll just be blunt: Tonight's our last grassroots fundraising deadline of the election, and it would make a real difference if you're able to chip in.

In the next few days, we're pitching in to support Warren Democrats in competitive races across the country. It's all powered by grassroots donors, and we need to hit our last goal by midnight tonight. But we're not quite there yet.

**I'm only asking because it is powerfully important:**

**[If you can, please make a donation of $2 or whatever makes sense before midnight tonight-- the final grassroots fundraising deadline of this election -- to support Warren Democrats and help turn the page on this dark chapter in our nation's history. ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525117/45c30650/1c7ae3d0b/66eb5a8c/1951194392/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S3_P")**

I'm in this fight all the way because I am dog-tired of hearing from Donald Trump and his Republican enablers. I am tired of leaders driving our country into the ground.

So I've endorsed some new voices -- 150 candidates around the country who believe that government can be a powerful force for good. Who believe that we can make progress on our toughest challenges if competence and moral clarity rule the day. Who can help take back the Senate, protect our House majority, and work at every level of government to put people first.

Just imagine a Senate where Mitch McConnell doesn't kill all progress. That Democratic Senate is within our reach. We also have a chance to take back key state houses from Republican control, so we can stop voter suppression and gerrymandering.

By fighting side by side, we can realize the America of our best imaginations. And remember, the next step begins when our election ends: our grassroots movement must continue to push those in power to pass the big, structural change that we're voting for.

**It's an honor to be in this fight with you. We can win this -- but only if we stay in this fight all the way. We've got to keep pushing, and that's only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you.**

**[If you're able to make a donation at this time, will you pitch in before midnight tonight to help hit this last fundraising goal of the election? Every donation goes a long way to help support Warren Democrats and our grassroots movement. And now that voting is almost over, the stakes have never been higher.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525117/45c30650/1c7ae3d0b/66eb5a8c/1951194392/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525117/45c30650/1c7ae3d0b/66eb5a8c/1951194392/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S3_P")

name: Mary Mancini
subject: **FIXED LINK** raising hell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20halloween%20banner%20gif_1.gif]
‘Twas the year 2020, on ol’ hallows eve
with no tricks or treats thanks to COVID-19
We voted with masks, standing six feet apart
To take out the orange that glows in the dark
Trump replaced RBG with a little Trump parrot
Confirming the seat to extreme Amy Barret
The white house proclaimed that the virus was done
And praised all the poll watchers waving their guns
Which brings us full circle, even if just for spite
Will you make a donation, by midnight tonight?
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Asset%2038%403x.png]
Peter
It’s Halloween - 3 days before Election Day - and Tennessee Democratic candidates are running hard across the state and raising quite a bit of hell. They have mobilized Tennesseans like never before, upset the status quo, and have their opponents running scared.
That’s why we’re having a day-long Halloween Hellraiser! We have until midnight tonight to reach our October end-of-month goal and - BOO! - we’re $5,460 short. The election may be 3 days away, but the TNDP is here to stay and we need to have the resources to keep supporting our candidates and raising hell.
Democracy isn’t about one election. There is a long game and the TNDP is here to play it. So please, if you can, make a donation to the TNDP right now. And if you haven’t yet MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE!
Thank you,
[https://ci4.googleusercontent.com/proxy/ouK0kDauFTTbyjn2epkgHa4jlJXIvXKzFnCLBfUNkLdm-QepKKnYletMRxIcSaeCgdVOU7Y2hFloxRxw--pyiKHc2iY2NcVR7EQVFoIjYkmr2w3IeKNgNnydQ_-647M7uOoYew3h59jK0-c=s0-d-e1-ft#https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/TNDP%20Logo%20transparent%20250w.png]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Remember in 2018, we only won with just 51.1% of the vote. That 's TOO CLOSE for comfort, and now I 'm the Democrats' top target in Texas for 2020. clean_body: Join us | | | | | | == | Patriot, Today is the LAST Saturday before Election Day, and our campaign is going to need your help to make this a Super Saturday for Kat's Congressional race! We are pulling out all the stops to make sure Kat fights for us in the Halls of Congress. If we can reach out to more voters, knock on more doors, and coordinate with our volunteers this weekend, we know that these crucial campaign operations will put Kat over the top on November 3rd. But we need the resources to execute this final strategy, and patriots like YOU can help us with the effort! | | | == | By rushing in a donation on this ==, you can ensure that our campaign takes all the necessary steps towards an overwhelming conservative victory! | == | | | | | | == | There isn't much time left to act! We need all hands on deck for just one last push if we want Kat to defeat the far-left, their Socialist agenda, and their "Defund the Police" movement here in Florida. Let's all do our part to help her! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you as always for your continued support! For Florida, Kat for Congress | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

The Election Day polls open in just 72 hours, and it’s all hands on deck!

The Democrats are going ALL OUT to protect this seat, but we have to flip it RED on Tuesday!

Peter,

I know your inbox is flooded with emails asking for money... **[but this email is different.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=782bcf5403784d77a1e70a3a1d1be11b&_e=QODshrGgzEE6O5Lm1ofZg8jB_JS71b9n7pb18oIZCaWCi-I-iTdi8aVBrxw8tyCas43RhrKf7rLqbdvd7zH2oZ-PiD67DXILgBfYu6w24X42keaQ-C5YRfk-hS_JpSbiTKPa3XNg3vX2PE0mg21zoKNuKgq9CsrQnTmulbnJumw4EoGbq6DLR5xm48NIBIWcaclxPWhoa65JVKCV8fYMuGXU5hXcc91qikFnH8OUaLEUKcTIfU7uemHXOm5TAY2ZxiEZYWr-LeOricn-fuyfbYRgmlrR-An2ncnWqlvORSU_R65xIkeY7rWwztQ-pQLDMWu4Abd5HXImHuK0E7ctJk4r3bpEtisKYo0YFz-jLGSfj5jksI4aDlAJ3_1lC_bO)**

**[As far as our October fundraising numbers are concerned, we’re behind. And I can’t sugar coat it. We’re down nearly $10,000 from where we were this time last month.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=782bcf5403784d77a1e70a3a1d1be11b&_e=QODshrGgzEE6O5Lm1ofZg8jB_JS71b9n7pb18oIZCaWCi-I-iTdi8aVBrxw8tyCas43RhrKf7rLqbdvd7zH2oZ-PiD67DXILgBfYu6w24X42keaQ-C5YRfk-hS_JpSbiTKPa3XNg3vX2PE0mg21zoKNuKgq9CsrQnTmulbnJumxxWNP-VuG0-vdbs94iuSMnBH6Bw4CeGJ3p9oLtXAILyS_hlwiCemolA8vTOZQJxvLLJ2a0boUdlK36YavrWw1seNLZXfKkdDcW2JQTdSTcjozWxmOG6H5D1owkh50WuxQLmFCXaG0ccVGG--NTmWDak8FBxF6nvRhV5fmSesTV2Dik8k3pqg6T9nLeDFLilvrHKqCeuWSqKIwI-T6L0mSq)**

I wish it weren’t the case, but since we have just 3 days left until Election Day, we’re getting creative with ways to ask you to help us reach our financial goals.

The Democrats are treating this election like it’s a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. **The only games I play are bingo and baseball, Peter.**

But in the spirit of competition and to prove to the out-of-touch Democrats that I don’t have to cheat to win, **[I am asking each of my supporters to join in on this fundraising game.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=782bcf5403784d77a1e70a3a1d1be11b&_e=QODshrGgzEE6O5Lm1ofZg8jB_JS71b9n7pb18oIZCaWCi-I-iTdi8aVBrxw8tyCas43RhrKf7rLqbdvd7zH2oZ-PiD67DXILgBfYu6w24X42keaQ-C5YRfk-hS_JpSbiTKPa3XNg3vX2PE0mg21zoKNuKgq9CsrQnTmulbnJumw5TZiGABiwcuMgxiQpvmIEmwuo8xvwYgkR2PU1qDJNeWAW3GobGPpEYrz_STnYIiIlaXWeqUgl_jMJvylOYD8Ch425q_NQWFI8T0IdI-xWHQU-dhbawYJ2CsHHy0YoF0adHCgUBgzQgRngsNmIOZ08daqAHOm7hiUdstThdibmJB2Kx5kmlG4hbNGyprkfBF4Gwl3oxDKOpb5bgQJJJgIB)**

| **We have 30 squares with different donation amounts.
My goal is to receive a donation of each square’s amount from strong conservative patriots across the nation.**

clean_body: Happy Halloween. Will you play a game of bingo with me? | Peter, I know your inbox is flooded with emails asking for money... I wish it weren’t the case, but since we have just 3 days left until Election Day, we’re getting creative with ways to ask you to help us reach our financial goals. The Democrats are treating this election like it’s a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. The only games I play are bingo and baseball, Peter. But in the spirit of competition and to prove to the out-of-touch Democrats that I don’t have to cheat to win, | We have 30 squares with different donation amounts. My goal is to receive a donation of each square’s amount from strong conservative patriots across the nation. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We have just THREE days to fill the squares and raise $10,000 that we need to finish out the campaign. I owe everything to your generosity. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- www.alekfororegon.com Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. **Cook Political Report moves Senate races in Texas, Georgia, Alaska toward Democrats
-The Hill **
Friend, this is so important.
**The Senate ratings have changed, showing Democrats are on the verge of a total liberal takeover.** Because of _MASSIVE_ liberal spending, our stalwart conservative state of Alaska has now become one of the most competitive races in the country.
It is for this reason that I'm coming to you now asking for help, Friend. **Will you help me achieve this goal of keeping Conservative leadership in Alaska?** My team and I have been working around the clock to push back against these attacks from the radical left, but their waves of outside PAC money is overwhelming. It is for this reason that I'm coming to you now asking for help, Friend. Will you help me achieve this goal of keeping Conservative leadership in Alaska?
