name: John Cornyn
subject: no further chances
body:
Friend, We watched at the start of this month how Chuck Schumer wrangled up his dark-money donors from across every liberal state to get them to chip in HUGE to my radical opponent's campaign.
Millions and MILLIONS have flooded her campaign, and she's welcomed it with open arms, while she simultaneously claims her campaign is that of small donors from folks in Texas... I think she may have it a bit twisted.
Friend, in 2018, MJ couldn't win a House race, so she decided to come for Sam Houston's U.S. Senate seat, for us. She's been getting trained and prepared for the last two years by the likes of Chuck Schumer to come for us -- and come for us strong. As a reminder, Friend, they're calling Texas their Ultimate Trophy.
And Friend, it has surprised me how we haven't countered back in ways I would have presumed we would have, **[BUT, I wanted to give you the immediate opportunity to change that NOW in our FINAL End of Month Deadline.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UKSO1pUdYnpA3NZv6j7ZYoBiAvU-AbNXZn1oVvSI6gAC7Cs7gNS-5Xt7FAH_0RkvB_Mri9cgo8fHxk0MMrE1lF3tQCtJosYIv4YRmvy7RxyQXffFczS6jQcyhISjU7pydEIvZbFWhRk8PTKgvdgj_eOSQ-EL-B-ouMoFBlPwX2CfhU2d_AktdJ2VOKCpmSVRMfpvfNmis21XgFCRUTi591i37ulA8OoqO7NlSNeEQY-2Fhfx8VfHdTBPb_3D5ZfujFccH-3kzBWdfEPE0MjZC5uJcS1vRCa6jrRa51VSUqvPPn94RU3yteU=&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==)** **FINAL END OF MONTH DEADLINE** Double Match: **ACTIVATED** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UKSO1pUdYnpA3NZv6j7ZYoBiAvU-AbNXZn1oVvSI6gAC7Cs7gNS-5Xt7FAH_0RkvB_Mri9cgo8fHxk0MMrE1lF3tQCtJosYIv4YRmvy7RxyQXffFczS6jQcyhISjU7pydEIvZbFWhRk8PTKgvdgj_eOSQ-EL-B-ouMoFBlPwX2CfhU2d_AktdJ2VOKCpmSVRMfpvfNmis21XgFCRUTi591i37ulA8OoqO7NlSNeEQY-2Fhfx8VfHdTBPb_3D5ZfujFccH-3kzBWdfEPE0MjZC5uJcS1vRCa6jizzlPl0mKGUUkFq-3QEz2I=&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==) There's a lot at risk in just a few days if we do NOT follow through and counter back entirely. Let me lay it out for y'all:
* First, we lose the Senate.

* Then, we lose the White House.

* The Radical Left now has control of every legislative branch of government, paving the way for them to pack the Supreme Court full of liberal justices who strike down every conservative value we hold near and dear to us here in Texas.

* Then, Friend, they eliminate the filibuster and RAM through every single radical bill that they've been campaigning on since 2016.

**[The consequences of this election are extreme, Friend, and we need your help, FAST, especially in this End of Month Deadline.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UKSO1pUdYnpA3NZv6j7ZYoBiAvU-AbNXZn1oVvSI6gAC7Cs7gNS-5Xt7FAH_0RkvB_Mri9cgo8fHxk0MMrE1lF3tQCtJosYIv4YRmvy7RxyQXffFczS6jQcyhISjU7pydEIvZbFWhRk8PTKgvdgj_eOSQ-EL-B-ouMoFBlPwX2CfhU2d_AktdJ2VOKCpmSVRMfpvfNmis21XgFCRUTi591i37ulA8OoqO7NlSNeEQY-2Fhfx8VfHdTBPb_3D5ZfujFccH-3kzBWdfEPE0MjZC5uJcS1vRCa6jpMUvGlbBoElDVlhZPbZgSw=&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==)**
With just hours to go before our FINAL deadline, we're asking for your FULL support, doing absolutely everything you can in these final days to ensure that when we wake up November 4th, the history of Texas rests in Conservative hands, not those that have been purchased from Far-Left Minority Leader Chuck Schumer.
Will you then wake up and think about how you could have done more? Please do all you can right now to ensure that does not become your reality.
John Cornyn
**[PS: This is our absolute FINAL End of Month Deadline of this cycle. There are no do-overs. No second chances. Please, act accordingly](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UKSO1pUdYnpA3NZv6j7ZYoBiAvU-AbNXZn1oVvSI6gAC7Cs7gNS-5Xt7FAH_0RkvB_Mri9cgo8fHxk0MMrE1lF3tQCtJosYIv4YRmvy7RxyQXffFczS6jQcyhISjU7pydEIvZbFWhRk8PTKgvdgj_eOSQ-EL-B-ouMoFBlPwX2CfhU2d_AktdJ2VOKCpmSVRMfpvfNmis21XgFCRUTi591i37ulA8OoqO7NlSNeEQY-2Fhfx8VfHdTBPb_3D5ZfujFccH-3kzBWdfEPE0MjZC5uJcS1vRCa6jucj5YP6Is1dxmocWPpCXkM=&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==)** Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UOJyd3LAS6j-Q9nqsK2XzNUXh_k-HlTcB_PELPJoqAdXjZ6ejyRgoIKSKbyAv8rYJJLPj4lxR63h0oidopTqwIVtc5EubYpr8_G-N6D-WPiHuF2atFdsgPg=&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UEJaTNGz0J3ooETM5EcDG5dgzCvLbyxeyStOcpqYQQ-cz57kexxtiOAkhqaGSrCfwvc2DE-6VEvioJ5bWfvE8Aj2Y657ElRtQkDg2R-G2bMB&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UOJyd3LAS6j-pgNv6M0heoj9IKf_I2ArGez9qRc-rFMohMKG76y-JBpEiizyPEXadLBhm2iUcHrmQ8lckHX2o9b7LCm7A_V5edCnTN0jA9ygL91UknPV09fDEGCPwyolbA==&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWgvKV4fXAqVe2sZV42-ddzhSYXbvffFLsCOSehp3oSydiageac0UEDY5vlCrYM6RsJWkt1oPISHy_CdKPCyOYPNrvB7sRQn97j662Uf6MYFEUkTIWwKBVjNKnkoQYkWgVq2SDezCqnTU6-pvJKxAidCA85dskJi0TPgd3nhM9uCG2RwL0VlAz72p7ZhPU-T0-HXKf-gv6tV_fdjFt8vESSV-Kdy882sE80Upk-qWa1-_oprmrjs_J1ldr-t4urikYATGf6madmaobzVZTkl7zRl65xZsCRds0I86u4cKcOyjbdWNMjdcw==&c=vbRUYiMZ5XV84XnhEqOq1Gw-tvTtp1z4-9BJmCZtaMGVQPMD12HFxw==&ch=Hs0ok9senhuyhBYPY6uNKBPvUkTnO1sd3FM-utCftR7LVi_e44B3-Q==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

I know that Republicans traditionally choose to vote on Election Day.
---
But I don't want to take any chances.
---
I don't want to wake up on November 4, thinking that if I had only pushed harder during early voting, we could've won this race.
---
**_You see: this isn 't just an election about policies. We're fighting against Bloomberg's $5 million campaign to crush me._**
---
_With that kind of money, he could hire chauffeurs to pick people up and drive them to the polls in every precinct in the state._
---

Here's what I'm going to do. | == Friend, Today is the last day of early voting in North Carolina... ...And I'm going to be honest with you: Democrats have an 8-point advantage over Republicans so far. That 's why I'm going on a blitz today to lock down every last early vote we can. But as it stands, we still need to raise another $2,142 to fully fund our field program all across the state. == == == I know that Republicans traditionally choose to vote on Election Day. But I don't want to take any chances. I don't want to wake up on November 4, thinking that if I had only pushed harder during early voting, we could've won this race. You see: this isn 't just an election about policies. We're fighting against Bloomberg's $5 million campaign to crush me. With that kind of money, he could hire chauffeurs to pick people up and drive them to the polls in every precinct in the state. That's why I don't want to leave anything to chance. Bloomberg can easily outspend me, but he'll NEVER outpace my fighting spirit. I want to make the Democrats' early voting as small as possible going into Election Day, because if there's one thing you need to know about me -- it's that I fight to win. == Thank you, == Mark Robinson Official Republican Nominee for Lt. Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: This weekend will decide it all. | == Friend, Tonight is our last chance to secure our final funds for tomorrow's LAST DAY OF EARLY VOTING in Florida. Even fake news CNN is admitting that Republicans have been eating away at the Democrats ' traditional early voting lead in Florida. But that could all end if Democrats get more of their supporters to the polls than we do on tomorrow's final day of early voting. As an Air Force veteran, I know that we must always keep fighting. We need to be certain our get-out-the-vote account is fully funded TONIGHT so that we'll be all set to go as soon as polls open tomorrow on the final day -- but right now, we 're $8,202 behind. == == == I want to share some headlines with you showing how Republicans have been fighting back against the Democrats' early voting lead. When even the media can't help but admit it, you know it has to be true: == [SOURCE: Politico] == [SOURCE: Sun Sentinel] == [SOURCE: Tampa Bay Times] But here's the thing... ...We're not the only ones who've seen these headlines. name: Mark Warner
subject: Now *this* is scary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | **Derek, there are just three days left until the most important election of our lifetimes.**

Most people don't know this, but Halloween is my favorite holiday. I love getting dressed up and passing out candy to the kids trick-or-treating on our street. This year, instead of thinking of Halloween festivities, I'm thinking about early voting ending today and the final push ahead of the election on November 3rd. I'm also thinking about something really scary: the possibility of another four years with the Trump administration in power.

We've come a long way during this campaign. As the Commonwealth grappled with the coronavirus pandemic, we built a campaign unlike any that I've ever been a part of so that we could safely connect with voters across Virginia. The resiliency Virginians have shown during this crisis is nothing short of inspiring. I can't thank you enough for showing up for me and for this campaign even as our Commonwealth and country faced serious challenges.

We've seen some really challenging times over the last year: a global pandemic that has killed more than 200,000 Americans, record unemployment amidst a sharp economic downturn, and a president running the country with incompetence and cruelty, instead of leading with compassion and courage. We have a chance to make real change in this election on November 3rd, and it starts with electing (and re-electing) Democrats up and down the ticket to keep Virginia blue.

I've fought to make health care more affordable, protect people with pre-existing conditions, and create an economy that works for all Virginians, and let me tell you: there's nothing scarier than the thought of not being able to do that for another six years in the Senate. I promise to keep fighting as hard as I can -- I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and put in the work to make life better for everyone in the Commonwealth.

If you can, please consider pitching in to get us across the finish line. Here's the donation link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-halloween](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f4/53d9897e/551d5005/1c88cc42/2284018856/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-halloween?refcode=20201031_f_1_nd__929__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support during these difficult times. You've been with me since the beginning; now let's cross the finish line.
| [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f4/53d9897e/551d5005/1c88cc41/2284018856/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-halloween?refcode=20201031_f_1_nd__929__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
-- Mark Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f4/53d9897e/551d5005/1c88cc40/2284018856/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-halloween?refcode=20201031_f_1_nd__929__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

body:
Here are the most up-to-date numbers from our Donation Drive. | |
---
Hey Friend,

I just got an update from our fundraising team about how the Donation Drive is going, and I am truly blown away.

**We already reached our end of month goal, which is why we are bumping it up by an extra $5,000.**

Our grassroots team outraised Chris Pappas last filing. If we rally today, I know we can do it again.
|
---
[**JOIN THE FINAL PUSH - CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=305902efbf314d2ea8446bc9472fd690&_e=eRpeYFdE9Bve8buZxbq3YZnLkzp6qM7Z7stw8EbUvYRi210faTMn_IRFwLgcpFv88qNIao6T_HRwAxTNwyjnKGA5h8hx5v59ymtZcGb1OuImUEqVNDSSnjoqVoYRoQFvVrwumEYxhJVwtz8VOPhK2UsPiTw1hFd_1wolxGncu0Kxf2B69ZNqXMVdjEWYRP4flDQE0biGajgahXhxJZq_GpD2lUb0z3Ks2JsL-cWL04tfqb1kX_a6oiZEjSU1D9lOPq5p1Ok5Vw1nRiVLV3NwEKrt_Sk2jpGkRG-qqsWQt6yPsm0KEfQMTrTkCO82a7MuVxau-80rXAPs5gzX1oxajidJB2PzFasN4kCwgEIHqcL1JokvEmbnDnYh9imYYNR3kAAHVKqizyIIQK3hdk_Zq6AwAfRvg8b5eGyK_Q95dl0fVj5t0olTS6wCzJwmQM-RDOhwaSwSXkol1vROtKgM_6PKMd9qVWvVXTYNJll7n_28H6M5hQCRReT5DQJyVLCc)
|
---
I know it feels like all you ever hear about these days is the election, but we are in the home stretch. **Our race is a toss-up, and we just surged ahead of Pappas in the polls - now we just have to keep the momentum going until Election Day.**

This is the last big fundraising push before the election, which is exactly why it’s so important.

**Every day, every donor, and every dollar gets us closer to the finish line.**

Help us finish what we started and close the election out strong by making a donation of any size to our campaign: **[https://secure.winred.com/mowers-for-congress/direct-1672066/](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=305902efbf314d2ea8446bc9472fd690&_e=eRpeYFdE9Bve8buZxbq3YZnLkzp6qM7Z7stw8EbUvYRi210faTMn_IRFwLgcpFv88qNIao6T_HRwAxTNwyjnKGA5h8hx5v59ymtZcGb1OuImUEqVNDSSnjoqVoYRoQFvVrwumEYxhJVwtz8VOPhK2UsPiTw1hFd_1wolxGncu0Kxf2B69ZNqXMVdjEWYRP4flDQE0biGajgahXhxJZq_GpD2lUb0z3Ks2JsL-cWL04tfqb1kX_a6oiZEjSU1D9lOPq5p1Ok5Vw1nRiVLV3NwEKrt_Sk2jpGkRG-qqsWQt6yIHx26un-_5KvK9qw30aqokI-CLS_d-Wrdbd51-b6Dfn__Ln-Gl0N-gUmxI6Yuuerx1y9asybkMvbndTcoIvG9S0jrWlqI9pH3w5P6EssSN_PCykO9MV67L0ImSHLxZJjUrUgUFNoGonSOjezBqOMtO2XctPKEJHEIWcJOqFb26eaF-5xcWODrhdChVmJlxwBbOWu078ikaaKH4-1RJUTh)**

Thank you for seeing this through to the end, friend.

\- Matt

From: Sarah
Date: Saturday, October 31, 2020 at 8:49 AM
To: Matt Mowers
Subject: The numbers you asked for

Hi Matt,

I pulled the most updated numbers from our end of month Donation Drive.

**You’ll be really excited to know that we already hit our initial goal of $40,000.**

The FEC end of month filing deadline is midnight tonight, so there’s still a little time to max this out. An extra $5,000 would make a major difference in the final push ahead of the election on Tuesday. Any way we could bump up our goal by $5K?

Thanks,
Sarah
_Mowers for Congress Finance Team_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: We Are Poised to Win 🗳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Dignity, justice, democracy, and the future of our nation are all on the ballot this year. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b7b2fdad6d&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=205b5e4ec3&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend, We are already voting and just days away from Election Day. The stakes could not be higher. Our votes represent more than a difference between two political parties; they are about the very survival of our nation. Make no mistake: Dignity, justice, equality, and the future of our democracy are on the ballot.

---
| [WHAT IS YOUR VOTING PLAN?](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c8da0dcb81&e=5886ca081d "WHAT IS YOUR VOTING PLAN?")
---
|
---
| [Are you voting early?](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=bb0944a619&e=5886ca081d) How are you getting to your voting center? Are you going to go vote before work or after work? Have you arranged childcare to go to vote? Who can you call on to help carry out your voting plan?

[Have you already voted?](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=162d2b825e&e=5886ca081d) Who can you offer to help so they, too, can get to the polls? Will you text or call 3 people to remind them to go vote? Will you help Team Hackett in our critical Get Out the Vote efforts? What is your action plan to bring Dignity and Justice to All, not the few?

Here are a some resources to help you vote:
* Visit [v](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=27c9fd8c27&e=5886ca081d)[ote.org](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=486eaa8ff7&e=5886ca081d) to make your plan to vote and find your polling place;
* Call the voter protection hotline at (833) 336-8683 if anything about the polling line seems suspicious (voter intimidation, visible political signage, etc.).

**If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out** to my staff at 574-404-7395 and we’ll be glad to connect you.

Thank you again for your continued support. Pat

subject: Nothing scarier

body:
What’s scarier than ghosts and goblins?
Dear Peter, It’s Halloween today... but no ghosts or goblins are as scary as what we face if Democrats keep control of the House this Tuesday. Can you imagine what will happen in Oklahoma, and across America, if the socialist Democrats win the White House, the U.S. Senate, AND keep control of the U.S. House next week? It’s a nightmare scenario that we CANNOT afford to ignore!That’s why we’re working so hard in this race. It’s vital that we keep Oklahoma’s First District “RED” by re-electing Kevin Hern. **[Please chip in $5, $10, or $20 today (or more if you can) to help us head into Election Day strong!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/509dbb654984320cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) ** The socialist Democrats want to drag America down a very dark path. From higher taxes to gun confiscation to forced government healthcare, they will do ANYTHING to win power and force their agenda on us! They would make the America that we know and love nothing but a memory. [**Please donate what you can**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/8a2d586f39d2ca6ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)**.** Every contribution will help. \- Team Hern [**Rush a $5 Halloween contribution >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/14d48181baac3233c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**Rush a $10 Halloween contribution >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/9888fbf4e7042ad6c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**Rush a $20 Halloween contribution >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/8b63a13fa3de94b0c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**Contribute Another Amount HERE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/b8c5cdb96110477ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/74be9ffec4d46fe7c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/089932ef70acb586/d9b2ada858d2b03cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

subject: Friend, can you read this?

body:
We know that you’ve been getting bombarded with political emails and texts, but if you read one — read this one. Friend, This is it — our FINAL End of Month deadline ends at midnight tonight, and I’m reaching out one last time to make sure you saw Nancy’s email.
We know that you’ve been getting bombarded with political emails and texts, but if you read one — **read this one. **
Our race is one of the top races in the entire country, and it’s going to be decided by a razor-thin margin and your donation could be the difference between winning and losing.
Can I count on you to come through for Nancy before our deadline hits tonight at midnight?
**Double-match our average small-dollar email donation of $34.08 here:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1671346/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=3d46d6a038524da7a6d587eb0a335b92&_e=9_mI91rgB5J8GJyWDLaBo0yKjS-kru8G-nWgpH3oCztH4p8ScpCRnJ068OVKlS649OCSNWuGVqqm-WOCizfhxqdDYOtnq8xokmP9iB0qh_bCwnAW8Pezc6GtJRK1TeKj1PQTC4JPc7DjxbtpgOYM4Zf0lWxI1SG7I5BEJn3L4Af5I5m4MD_Lut-jvH19uTeaxbyWFEwkR3h_JBJU7aA9lDR_bWfMMX7ec4EB3D_aiQQ56ydBEwDShUtjVPo8FRre0a-r3NxhhOsDiL1yog64CdenHm3yzBdDf0SqjgdpdYZruO-YAeStWLGIFkVgK9e9y2h1ZPvJhEb9WRIEseGa6tlCX2D9LpPFRcJJDFKCxL7wqJx16Pu2X6gaqdYZ7PDokHSkywRcKnFgAlW7NQ6FYcWhaoar_-6nk6_G3H2LaXQnaJyyKcZoNPmNEp3pe2o3waS6wmbOcPy3KbbSG790yjHz2d1G07K8AFLBUP1iGO8%3D)**
Thank you for your support,
Mara

We’ve outworked my opponent — Democrat Joe Cunningham — every step of the way, and we need to continue outworking him if we’re going to put the Lowcountry First and restore real leadership to our district.
It’s not going to be easy, but I know that if we push hard enough over the next few days that we will be able to deliver for the Lowcountry on Election Day.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out right now and asking all of our grassroots donors to match our small-dollar email average of $34.08.**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=3d46d6a038524da7a6d587eb0a335b92&_e=9_mI91rgB5J8GJyWDLaBo0yKjS-kru8G-nWgpH3oCztH4p8ScpCRnJ068OVKlS64iq2qwNF1BabU6uDcLQ1kHV9Ut3spq1wYACTysnuXx810g0T7BawFefFSO3avre5GcmhiGwr5stiKRX3w2kBK7SJSTaqqs5NGRSz2S4KMTdyB25yvT0etECSNeigGrDu7YkZThVGlw4vEEfsAeue48QcmS9iWnMygx--kUyrlusSeqH7DCItNm0WIJcuSpW1pMPvcdd6S43i7RVErq5nIEzNk_LpzYcb2a4gqUJ8fGFFvwkQJU84iOOdFmhyFa2BoYbi6JU0tBuBLoKW0gZfh_ZnHTnMc4XsnCyCXD0XACW6cHgRrAcjNvBT9o1_7V6lAKhr_551t0OzY_KJ4Q008IbkwTBwDoXxlV-WuhviAxdpYY-o7sawf-G2Quv0bB2sRVWrs42rYqvozU54LxE_6C-U4Se5w3LYUY-fSVHqJRjtGqijwEnAgrAua2_htCAWb)
If everyone who reads this email can match our average small-dollar email donation, we’ll be in a great position to win on November 3.
Can I count on you?
Donate here: **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1671346/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=3d46d6a038524da7a6d587eb0a335b92&_e=9_mI91rgB5J8GJyWDLaBo0yKjS-kru8G-nWgpH3oCztH4p8ScpCRnJ068OVKlS64iq2qwNF1BabU6uDcLQ1kHV9Ut3spq1wYACTysnuXx810g0T7BawFefFSO3avre5GcmhiGwr5stiKRX3w2kBK7SJSTaqqs5NGRSz2S4KMTdyB25yvT0etECSNeigGrDu7YkZThVGlw4vEEfsAeue48QcmS9iWnMygx--kUyrlusSeqH7DCItNm0WIJcuSpW1pMPvcdd6S43i7RVErq5nIEzNk_LpzYcb2a4gqUJ8fGFG93svYv0S5uMY7rVaDz4QM2E4Zc_t-KZlriCpzyvzD_3jCncYdeTDwGwP8gSzhPe7kK_qwMyPOrJRdrudSrwHbiR_JjCN5ZbVlQ_6haB7dDQifTyt80yX3UKGWxS8ySm6atp1_b5GjS4vd0hiZnzQIAAgm74S0fqA2z6hS5wsEdkvyxTmUzFLT2pzbmrZA6Ynkg9ktDJBd7tZ_kKdetagI)**

Our race is one of the top races in the entire country, and it’s going to be decided by a razor-thin margin and your donation could be the difference between winning and losing. Can I count on you to come through for Nancy before our deadline hits tonight at midnight? Double-match our average small-dollar email donation of $34.08 here: Thank you for your support, Mara \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Nancy Mace Subject: re: just a few days To: Friend, There are just a few days left until Election Day and we’re working harder than ever here at Team Mace. We’ve outworked my opponent — Democrat Joe Cunningham — every step of the way, and we need to continue outworking him if we’re going to put the Lowcountry First and restore real leadership to our district. It’s not going to be easy, but I know that if we push hard enough over the next few days that we will be able to deliver for the Lowcountry on Election Day. If everyone who reads this email can match our average small-dollar email donation, we’ll be in a great position to win on November 3. Can I count on you? name: Tim Scott
subject: Friend, just asking for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly, I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. %%First Name%%, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.
Friend,

We are just hours away from our FINAL fundraising deadline of the 2020 election. **I****f every person reading this email chips in just $5, we will blow past our goal.**
[Chip in $5](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/the-value-of-a-dollar/?utm_campaign=20201031_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1039090-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201031_first-name-just-asking-for-5)
---
I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

_**I understand the value of a dollar.**_

I don't take asking for money lightly, I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.

Tim Scott

body:
There's no time to waste. Don't be a bystander this election - we are rapidly approaching Election Day, and I need to know I can count on you!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B5huJRhu7QOAFHuPSIRatQbEbLghPyzbzfeyVY9QVVEO_y585FPUyAri7MHC2SxrG1r8sJLmtrUcWP_htIn9kF_Bo4FQj-DHJ4_gpCrQKS8tHiBi_ggoShQgjvgThY-zsR1UwF1nxF9SoKe5MzsGcPpdLSu_SazFpJoaUCn6ygWSD0lTzBeascmrcSfZ9fauqANFWLlSHzxCtnZRIkbbYPKzBM1ljlnGOEHKNM3QsKwspxc_AWTZEzy_WCFhNZD7axa-78FU1bNrM59-EGbc9B4q3s-4Td-UAc5jo_uUCCCwxbChsVomUvEo0s1uWA-OJM6EGay9-4EZ3hg6wzI4nsLdEotOAeUp9Y222aeJqvzKydrpeUl2EZyaOrEuhqHw&c=-lJE756BL9ONcl1TwpUnhjWZYzJnuBdXjc5KI5dfg3YauA9KhyoWeA==&ch=kVngZ9fP_ZCH-IIIaPTbDPPtZPSVNe5_-RIV94rVXZWu2woBYld95g==)

Friend,

This is worse than I imagined.

**We are just hours from the FINAL End of Month deadline before the election** , and I am $88,312 short of my goal. With just 3 days until Election Day, coming up short would be disastrous. [**Can you pitch in $10, $30, or more to help me reach this important goal?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B5huJRhu7QOAFHuPSIRatQbEbLghPyzbzfeyVY9QVVEO_y585FPUyAri7MHC2SxrG1r8sJLmtrUcWP_htIn9kF_Bo4FQj-DHJ4_gpCrQKS8tHiBi_ggoShQgjvgThY-zsR1UwF1nxF9SoKe5MzsGcPpdLSu_SazFpJoaUCn6ygWSD0lTzBeascmrcSfZ9fauqANFWLlSHzxCtnZRIkbbYPKzBM1ljlnGOEHKNM3QsKwspxc_AWTZEzy_WCFhNZD7axa-78FU1bNrM59-EGbc9B4q3s-4Td-UAc5jo_uUCCCwxbChsVomUvEo0s1uWA-OJM6EGay9-4EZ3hg6wzI4nsLdEotOAeUp9Y222aeJqvzKydrpeUl2EZyaOrEuhqHw&c=-lJE756BL9ONcl1TwpUnhjWZYzJnuBdXjc5KI5dfg3YauA9KhyoWeA==&ch=kVngZ9fP_ZCH-IIIaPTbDPPtZPSVNe5_-RIV94rVXZWu2woBYld95g==)

To make matters worse, Joe Biden spent millions on an ad blitz and was just here for a major campaign event in my state. If I don't reach this goal, it'll severely hurt our chances of keeping Arizona and the Senate red.

It's not a secret - Arizona is central to Democrats' 2020 strategy. I'm on the frontlines of defending the Senate, and I urgently need your help. [**Donate today to help me reach our mid-month goal!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B5huJRhu7QOAFHuPSIRatQbEbLghPyzbzfeyVY9QVVEO_y585FPUyAri7MHC2SxrG1r8sJLmtrUcWP_htIn9kF_Bo4FQj-DHJ4_gpCrQKS8tHiBi_ggoShQgjvgThY-zsR1UwF1nxF9SoKe5MzsGcPpdLSu_SazFpJoaUCn6ygWSD0lTzBeascmrcSfZ9fauqANFWLlSHzxCtnZRIkbbYPKzBM1ljlnGOEHKNM3QsKwspxc_AWTZEzy_WCFhNZD7axa-78FU1bNrM59-EGbc9B4q3s-4Td-UAc5jo_uUCCCwxbChsVomUvEo0s1uWA-OJM6EGay9-4EZ3hg6wzI4nsLdEotOAeUp9Y222aeJqvzKydrpeUl2EZyaOrEuhqHw&c=-lJE756BL9ONcl1TwpUnhjWZYzJnuBdXjc5KI5dfg3YauA9KhyoWeA==&ch=kVngZ9fP_ZCH-IIIaPTbDPPtZPSVNe5_-RIV94rVXZWu2woBYld95g==)

_Biden 's campaign is confident they can turn Arizona blue._ This is going to be an incredibly close election, and every dollar between now and Election Day is critical to our success.

There's no time to waste. Don't be a bystander this election - we are rapidly approaching Election Day, and I need to know I can count on you! [**Pitch in any amount to help me reach my goal and help defend Arizona from a liberal takeover!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B5huJRhu7QOAFHuPSIRatQbEbLghPyzbzfeyVY9QVVEO_y585FPUyAri7MHC2SxrG1r8sJLmtrUcWP_htIn9kF_Bo4FQj-DHJ4_gpCrQKS8tHiBi_ggoShQgjvgThY-zsR1UwF1nxF9SoKe5MzsGcPpdLSu_SazFpJoaUCn6ygWSD0lTzBeascmrcSfZ9fauqANFWLlSHzxCtnZRIkbbYPKzBM1ljlnGOEHKNM3QsKwspxc_AWTZEzy_WCFhNZD7axa-78FU1bNrM59-EGbc9B4q3s-4Td-UAc5jo_uUCCCwxbChsVomUvEo0s1uWA-OJM6EGay9-4EZ3hg6wzI4nsLdEotOAeUp9Y222aeJqvzKydrpeUl2EZyaOrEuhqHw&c=-lJE756BL9ONcl1TwpUnhjWZYzJnuBdXjc5KI5dfg3YauA9KhyoWeA==&ch=kVngZ9fP_ZCH-IIIaPTbDPPtZPSVNe5_-RIV94rVXZWu2woBYld95g==)

With just 3 days until Election Day, coming up short would be disastrous. == To make matters worse, Joe Biden spent millions on an ad blitz and was just here for a major campaign event in my state. If I don't reach this goal, it'll severely hurt our chances of keeping Arizona and the Senate red. It's not a secret - Arizona is central to Democrats' 2020 strategy. I'm on the frontlines of defending the Senate, and I urgently need your help. == Biden 's campaign is confident they can turn Arizona blue. This is going to be an incredibly close election, and every dollar between now and Election Day is critical to our success. There's no time to waste. Don't be a bystander this election - we are rapidly approaching Election Day, and I need to know I can count on you! == Thank you for stepping up! In Service, Martha McSally == Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc. 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265 PHOENIX, AZ 85032 | | McSally for Senate, Inc. | 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265, Phoenix, AZ 85032 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Cory Gardner
subject: My team just told me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
In recent weeks and months, I made my case to the people of Colorado. I have made my case by showing how much we have accomplished in the past six years and how much more we can achieve in the next six years.

Friend,

In recent weeks and months, I made my case to the people of Colorado. I have made my case by showing how much we have accomplished in the past six years and how much more we can achieve in the next six years.

Together, we have passed the 9-8-8 Suicide Prevention Hotline bill, the Great American Outdoors Act, and enacted cyber sanctions on hostile nations. We have created more jobs and opportunities to help people all across the state, but John Hickenlooper has called all of this meaningless.

This morning, my team informed me we opened our Emergency Voter Contact Fund to ensure we can reach the few undecided voters that will decide the election, and Friend, I'm asking for your support right now to make sure we can talk to them. [**If you can $5, $10, or even $25 to my campaign before our final October deadline at 11:59 tonight, it will give us the fighting chance we need.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oIU3LkvmuQDV_Le0AZ5g3Av5Uda66xy5vkxXbnaMZp8xpiMFtgJZYbr_1nqIWUe3nJnJnYDPYvwX2MHu0X-3mP1he8RZ2NtHxA5xJYikvzAFYEBa_WrLKSCRXrP8IZDT-yyCU-ElxFPIee8zba-ZDBWabem6LkdLBVe94u97mieBQgj1KfjoVjmKkosfcj4sNeePghkL-nbJogQe6llohMy9C-Uj8ECV8elmypVNP52VA8ZFxBJRYAFVnaFkGx2Q9iJs9SPTuqlWkkXaaGWSnX4yHb26lOCOGyrdAO2dyGd-3vg7zCYxrX0gGGV_UtgaMZJp-7g0WyyMWap9sLSDSyGrjTQl6zujjp7lhRbKZhCOIiajUxPNrnC6wQeaMYleZO3k0gJoFHVM5YzABRN-1I9UHPsulbGDQWbY1tRFUHpvYeQTx52ciUHwwL2XSlHCG2hKgndKxzc=&c=NGJ0CtlBBubhTvIozl3-KUwns80TLwI6kUXeb_yBYRFwwV9m0pTSXg==&ch=IUbxDa5fu_vkWX1ETC9GM69xdAwX3aB3PON7QYM1WoHVHA6mpYO_Ig==)

It is up to us, Friend. I've seen the numbers. There are just enough undecided voters to carry us over the finish line, but we need to reach them! Can you help me out and decide the future of Colorado?
**[**DONATE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oIU3LkvmuQDV_Le0AZ5g3Av5Uda66xy5vkxXbnaMZp8xpiMFtgJZYbr_1nqIWUe3nJnJnYDPYvwX2MHu0X-3mP1he8RZ2NtHxA5xJYikvzAFYEBa_WrLKSCRXrP8IZDT-yyCU-ElxFPIee8zba-ZDBWabem6LkdLBVe94u97mieBQgj1KfjoVjmKkosfcj4sNeePghkL-nbJogQe6llohMy9C-Uj8ECV8elmypVNP52VA8ZFxBJRYAFVnaFkGx2Q9iJs9SPTuqlWkkXaaGWSnX4yHb26lOCOGyrdAO2dyGd-3vg7zCYxrX0gGGV_UtgaMZJp-7g0WyyMWap9sLSDSyGrjTQl6zujjp7lhRbKZhCOIiajUxPNrnC6wQeaMYleZO3k0gJoFHVM5YzABRN-1I9UHPsulbGDQWbY1tRFUHpvYeQTx52ciUHwwL2XSlHCG2hKgndKxzc=&c=NGJ0CtlBBubhTvIozl3-KUwns80TLwI6kUXeb_yBYRFwwV9m0pTSXg==&ch=IUbxDa5fu_vkWX1ETC9GM69xdAwX3aB3PON7QYM1WoHVHA6mpYO_Ig==)**
---

Thank you again for all your support.

-Cory

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: EVENT INVITE: Come join us on election night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We're taking the party to Main Street! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9dd2ba7a96f3/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-9419522?e=1050d051da)
---
| | **We're taking the party to Main Street! Come celebrate with us on November 3rd!**

I am so thrilled to invite you to our election night watch party being held in my hometown of Galena, Kansas. Thank you to those who have already sent us an email RSVP for our election night party. We are so excited to see you there and enjoy an evening celebrating the end of an incredible election season.

I've attached the invite below, and here's a little more detail about the party. It starts at 7:30pm and will be held on Main Street. There will be a heated tent and outdoor area with space heaters. So be sure to dress accordingly. There will be food, live music, a cash bar and of course television screens set up to watch the election results as they come in.

Thank you again to those who have already sent us a response. We are so appreciative of the overwhelming support you have given us throughout the campaign. Hope to see you next week!

_-Jake_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: The spookiest of goals 👻
body:
Happy Halloween! Today is the last day of October - which means it is the last day for you to donate and get us to our October goal. I am running to | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6f61a7ddaf14/the-spookiest-of-goals?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
**Happy Halloween!** Today is the last day of October - which means it is the last day for you to donate and get us to our October goal.

I am running to unseat a _ghoulish_ Republican incumbent who has a truly _scary_ record on things like the Affordable Care Act, freedom of choice, LGBTQ equality, rights for workers, and environmental protections. The healthcare bill he and his colleagues tried to pass was just _a trick with no treats_. His foreign policy is _monstrous_ , and he moves through the district like a _ghost_. He likes to go on CNN and put on a _mask_ of rationality, but underneath he is just another _terrifyingly_ far right Congressman.

I, on the other hand, am _summoning_ all my powers to raise democracy from the _dead_ and ensure the people of IL-16 have adequate representation, because with me, my authenticity is not a _costume_ \- it’s who I really am.

[Can I count on you to chip in so that we can flip IL-16 and stop my opponent from _haunting_ the House of Representatives with his _dead_ -on-arrival record?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=941452ebc1&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: Right now
body:
Peter,
The time for action is right now.
After months of buildup and hard work, we’re now three days from Election Day.
**[So I’ll get right to the point -- if you haven’t yet made a donation, now’s the time. If you’ve given, I ask you to give again.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201031apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201031apl01nd&n=1)**
If you want to know why it’s so important, think back just a couple of years.
In 2016, My Faith Votes helped to drive record Christian turnout. And in the few years since, what’s happened? We’ve confirmed three originalist justices to the U.S. Supreme Court, moved the U.S. Embassy to Jerusalem, and issued new rules to prevent our taxpayer dollars from funding abortion both at home and abroad. And the list goes on.
On Tuesday, we have the chance to ensure that our Judeo-Christian values continue to drive both the conversation and agenda in Washington, D.C., and our state capitals.
If we don’t show up, the progressive, secular Left will be in the driver’s seat. I promise you that.
**[Right now, help My Faith Votes with a donation. Your gift will immediately go to mobilize an additional one million disengaged Christian voters in critical swing states through our proven digital door-knocking campaign.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201031apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201031apl01nd&n=2)**
We’re the only country on the planet founded on the self-evident truth that we are all children of God, endowed with certain unalienable rights. Let’s not mess that up.
Thank you for all your dedication and generosity, now let’s get this done.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201031apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201031apl01nd&n=3)
Steadfast and Loyal,
Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201031apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201031apl01nd&n=5).

body:
Only 3 days until Election Day. Yes, you read that right. We are only THREE days away from Election Day. Have you voted yet? Do you have a plan to.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/do-you-have-a-plan-to-vote?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| Hello Hoosier Republican,

**Only 3 days until Election Day.**

Yes, you read that right. We are only THREE days away from Election Day. Have you voted yet? Do you have a plan to vote? Having a plan is the best way to make your voting experience as easy as possible. Your Indiana Republican Party team has you covered for all things voting. Check out the link below for answers to all your voting questions.
[\--> Click here to make your plan to vote <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07b26da270&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Already done your part and voted but still looking to get involved? We need team players to help finish our "full-court press" strong.

Volunteers will make a difference in this election and we appreciate all the help we can get. Use the link below if you're interested in helping your Republican team finish strong.
[\--> Click here and sign up to volunteer <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cddd9a4a24&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: RSLC
subject: Will Republicans lose?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
It's up to you, %%First Name%%
We have less than 24 hours until our FINAL end of month deadline, and things aren't looking good.
**In fact, Friend, it 's looking really bad. **
With less than 24 hours until November, we are still WAY behind our monthly fundraising goal.
We need to send last minute texts, last minute emails, and knock thousands of more doors to save Trump's state allies from defeat -- but we need to make sure we meet our fundraising goals to do that.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Kibbe?=
subject: 👏💥 We've Got the Numbers 💥👏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
I spent last night going over the numbers. We can win this. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0d2d4594e6&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I spent last night going over the numbers. _We can win this. _

We often hear how this District has been gerrymandered to help Republicans. It's true. But it is also true that if everyone in this District voted, we would win. In 2012, Jackie won this Congressional seat with 49% of the vote. Since that time, the majority of new voter registrants have been Democratic. And we have more Democrats who do not vote each year than Republicans. [We’ve got the numbers, it’s about getting them to the polls.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=59f1a1c73d&e=5886ca081d)

Over the last two months, together we’ve made over 40,000 calls and 50,000 texts to voters in this District telling them about Pat’s message. This weekend, we have hundreds of volunteers making thousands more calls to Get Out the Vote.

**It’s working. 135,000 people have already voted. And based on our data about who has cast their ballot, we’re winning. Let me say that again:_We are winning._ [We just need to keep it up for the next four days.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b0195552d3&e=5886ca081d)**

But we need your help. The money we raise over the next four days is critical to our layered GOTV efforts through TV, digital, calls, and texts. We cannot emphasize enough how important your financial investment this weekend is to meet our fundraising goal for GOTV. Your investment will go directly to getting Pat’s message out to our supporters and to getting people out to the polls. Will you contribute to help us win?

_[If everyone pitches in a little, we can do a lot.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f7b33e3d69&e=5886ca081d)_

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ac7151cf6a&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $25")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=974e110eb9&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $50")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1f74aa4dfb&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $100")
---
| [DONATE SOMETHING ELSE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a5cd0fc9e6&e=5886ca081d "DONATE SOMETHING ELSE")
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

This is a people-powered campaign. It always has been. Let’s win on November 3 for Dignity and Justice for All!

Thank you,
Patrick

---
|

She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

name: Corky Messner
subject: I’m counting on you on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
This is going to be one of the most important ones of our lifetimes, and we need to make sure every single Granite State conservative makes it to the polls next Tuesday.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bed92e60b68fa4e7/17776a69f98f87bfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, It's hard to believe the election is next week. This is going to be one of the most important ones of our lifetimes, and we need to make sure every single Granite State conservative makes it to the polls next Tuesday.

We’re working hard to win over every voter we can – knocking on doors, delivering literature, making phone calls, and reaching out to folks online.

**We can’t let up for a minute in the fight to defeat radical leftist Jeanne Shaheen, and it all comes down to next Tuesday**.

It’s vital that we get every one of my supporters to the polls!

So please, make your plan to vote next week... and bring a family member or friend along with you to vote for Corky for Senate! **[>> If you’re not sure where to vote, you can find your polling location here. <<](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bed92e60b68fa4e7/bb0a5f595116adc5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Polls open at different times across the state next Tuesday, so check your local polling location's hours! Mark your calendar, and pick a time.

Let your family and friends know that I’m running to bring commonsense conservatism to New Hampshire, support President Trump, and Keep America Great!

Sincerely,
Corky Messner [🗳 Find Your Election Day Polling Location >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bed92e60b68fa4e7/df0bdadef016496fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bed92e60b68fa4e7/a34b6bfb24b8a105c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bed92e60b68fa4e7/270564a6d10101c6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

P.O. Box 10370, Bedford, NH, 03110

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call: Our FINAL fundraising deadline is at midnight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Don't let the ghouls and goblins become reality.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA) Friend, Today might be all about ghouls and goblins -- but the real nightmare could be just a few days away. The end of this election is in just three days. If we lose, no scary story will top the real one we're about to face: Donald Trump's rhetoric has won. Even here in Washington state, right-wing extremism has taken hold, and there's no way out. **But there is a way out: We vote. We can't let fear take control -- we can still act to build a better future.** **Our FINAL deadline is at midnight TONIGHT, and a donation right now is an investment in the fight against hate and division and for hope and progress.[Donate $5 or more right now before our FINAL fundraising deadline of this election.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13533?t=4&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13534?t=5&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13535?t=6&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13536?t=7&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13537?t=8&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13538?t=9&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13533?t=10&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)
---
I hope we're about to leave the real-life fear behind for good. But we'll only do it if we invest in something better, right now. Thanks for believing in that -- I know I still do.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13533?t=11&akid=8220%2E868730%2EJPOYsA)

body:
Out of everywhere in the country... right here?
| Friend,
---
Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is our final end-of-month deadline of the election.
---
Kamala Harris just came to Houston yesterday to try and give our Democrat opponent a fundraising boost at the final hour to defeat our campaign.

With just a couple of days left until the election, Democrats chose to send their vice presidential candidate to Houston, Texas -- out of everywhere in the country -- because our congressional race could decide EVERYTHING.

clean_body: Out of everywhere in the country... right here? | Friend, Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is our final end-of-month deadline of the election. Kamala Harris just came to Houston yesterday to try and give our Democrat opponent a fundraising boost at the final hour to defeat our campaign. With just a couple of days left until the election, Democrats chose to send their vice presidential candidate to Houston, Texas -- out of everywhere in the country -- because our congressional race could decide EVERYTHING. But right now, we’re $24,590 behind on our goal with just hours to go before the deadline that will be instrumental for our final ad buys and ground game. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Sent: Fri, Oct 30, 2020 Subject: Kamala is targeting me today To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Kamala Harris is coming to Houston, Texas TODAY to try and end our surging campaign. She knows the polls are tied and that the Democrat incumbent is too afraid to even debate me, so Kamala is going on a fundraising blitz for her at the final hour. But as I always say, Democrats should know better than to put a target on the back of a U.S. Army Captain. I always fight back. Kamala knows that my Democrat opponent would be a rubber stamp vote for her anti-energy agenda that would completely destroy Texas’ economy. That’s why Kamala announced earlier this year that she was going to go “all in” to help Texas Democrats -- and set my race as one of her top targets. She should’ve known better than to target me, because it’s not just me on this campaign... I have an ARMY of grassroots donors like you fighting by my side. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. subject: Peter, join us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/WBgfDS9M5dR-GVBxbP5I9yYHDVXR4Je3olCVdYKwFgs=/oGtyq9kIEnrdKSqaLsFS5TXVzWAWUJHPJWHgKTrcPiI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201031-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

We have only _**[three days left](https://act.myngp.com/el/WBgfDS9M5dR-GVBxbP5I9yYHDVXR4Je3olCVdYKwFgs=/oGtyq9kIEnrdKSqaLsFS5TXVzWAWUJHPJWHgKTrcPiI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201031-1-EM&amount=25)**_ until Election Day.

I wanted to pause for a moment and reach out to you to emphasize just how critical these final days are. Voters across the district have made their voices heard in record numbers during Early Voting, but so many more still need to cast their ballots on Tuesday.

We can win this election, but we must ensure that supporters from all corners of VA-07 turn out to vote. There is no time to wait, our campaign needs your help to get out the vote on November 3rd.
---

The ads running against me are making false claims about my work, attempting to discredit my record serving in Congress and the CIA. These outside groups will pour even more money into our district in these final days, flooding the airwaves with lies against me.

**[All votes will be cast in just three days, and it 's imperative that we set the record straight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WBgfDS9M5dR-GVBxbP5I9yYHDVXR4Je3olCVdYKwFgs=/oGtyq9kIEnrdKSqaLsFS5TXVzWAWUJHPJWHgKTrcPiI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201031-1-EM&amount=25)** Our campaign is doing all we can to reach voters across the ten counties in our district.

These final efforts will require a lot of resources, and our campaign is rooted in grassroots support from people like you.

[_**Peter, can you join us today and help us with the final effort to get out the vote by contributing whatever you can to our campaign?**_ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/WBgfDS9M5dR-GVBxbP5I9yYHDVXR4Je3olCVdYKwFgs=/oGtyq9kIEnrdKSqaLsFS5TXVzWAWUJHPJWHgKTrcPiI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201031-1-EM&amount=25)Your contribution will allow us to distribute yard signs, make phone calls, and continue running ads to do the most important work of all: turning out voters.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Stories worth sharing
body:
President Trump’s accomplishments are unparalleled. But for the past four years, the leftwing media... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3b80cf028&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 31, 2020
---
| | |
# **Stories worth sharing**

**President Trump’s accomplishments** are unparalleled. But for the past four years, the leftwing media—with help from their allies in Big Tech—has refused to cover this Administration fairly. Recently, some companies are even censoring conservative voices.

**Here are six stories** that explain the historic work of President Trump’s Administration. Please share them with anyone you think should hear them.
1. [**The Blue-Collar Presidency**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2944f61012&e=3ee4985eea): President Trump is fighting for the middle-class Americans once sidelined by our country’s own politicians. Under his Administration, wages are growing faster for workers than for managers and fastest for those without a college degree.

2. [**America’s Seniors Will Pay for a Democrat-Socialist Agenda**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8af106ba39&e=3ee4985eea): Average Medicare health plan premiums have dropped by 34% under President Trump. The far left’s “Medicare for All” socialist scheme threatens this progress.

3. [**The Trump Doctrine—Terrorists Lose and Peace Wins**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14daf6aec4&e=3ee4985eea): Five years ago, Americans watched in horror as ISIS gained power and terrorists killed on U.S. soil. Today, ISIS is destroyed, terrorist leaders Al-Baghdadi and Soleimani are dead, and instead of fighting endless wars, America is brokering peace deals.

4. [**Put the American People First, Not China**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c59c2fa5c&e=3ee4985eea): For years, the left stood by as the Chinese Communist Party hurt American citizens. With COVID-19, they’re doing it again. President Trump’s strategy is clear: Don’t punish Americans for the mistakes and failures of other countries and global organizations.

5. [**The Fastest Recovery in History**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f9b4540a3&e=3ee4985eea): America has added more than 11 million jobs since May—the quickest comeback on record. New GDP data also reveals the American economy is weathering the global pandemic better than Europe.

6. [**Donald Trump Fought the Establishment—and Won**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cc546b8fe&e=3ee4985eea): President Trump took on the far left, the Republican donor class, the corporate media, China, Big Pharma, and the failed ideology of globalization. The American people wanted change, and the political class didn’t listen. Fortunately, President Trump did.

**President Trump** has fought tirelessly for the American people–and he’s just getting started!
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump wave as they board Marine One** | October 22, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b801bbf31&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c9d190df8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fda5d4bfe6)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

clean_body: Yesterday, I sent you a reminder of how important it is to get out and vote. We are now just DAYS AWAY from Election Day. If you didn’t get the.... Peter, Yesterday, I sent you a reminder of how important it is to get out and vote. We are now just DAYS AWAY from Election Day. If you didn’t get the chance to vote early, check your voter information, make a plan, and get out there on November 3rd. The state of our nation depends on it. We can’t keep letting Susan Wild and the socialist Democratic party run the House in Washington. It’s time to bring back Conservative values to PA-07. This is your LAST chance to contribute to our 4x MATCHING we are holding from now until the election. This is your chance to make history. FINAL END OF MONTH DEADLINE Email: Status: Pending I am thankful for the support, Peter, for your contributions and time. But now is the most important step- VOTING! Think of the future generations of Americans that will be affected from this election. Lisa Scheller \-------Forwarded Message Below------ Peter, The election is just a few days away. There is still so much to be done between now and when the ballot boxes close on Tuesday, but Peter, the time is now to get out and vote to restore Conservative values in PA-07. There is so much on the line this election. The Democrats have an agenda of defunding the police and packing the Supreme Court if they win--they’ll do anything they can to entirely radicalize our nation--stopping at nothing. We can’t let that happen- and we need your help NOW. Early-voting is happening in Pennsylvania NOW. To get all the information you need to vote, check here: Peter, my opponent Socialist Susan Wild is far more concerned with pleasing socialist her boss in Congress Nancy Pelosi than prioritizing the American people. With such little time left until the election, I need your help. From now until the election, we are having a 4X MATCHING period. FINAL END OF MONTH DEADLINE Email: Status: Pending The time is now to contribute--There are no do overs, no second chances--This. Is. it. Your help will go toward restoring American values in the House of Representatives. It’s time to make a change in Congress. If you agree with me, Peter, Your efforts will not go unnoticed. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Friend,

**I can’t believe it.**

Election Day is just four days away. It’s been more of a marathon than a sprint and we couldn’t have done any of it without your support, but I’ll be honest – we need you in our corner now more than at any other point in the race.

The future of Congress – and in turn, the future of our entire country – comes down to what we do in these next four days and Nancy Pelosi and her super PACs are working overtime right now to put their agenda ahead of the American people for two more years.

**This is it, friend. Tuesday’s coming up and this is our last chance to fight back and get Congress back to its original mission – working for the American people!**

We’re in the final push (three days left!) to Election Day and now is the time to go all-out as we finish out this fight to deliver conservative leadership for America’s future. What we do in these final days will make a difference for decades to come – and we need you to be a part of making that difference. Can we count on you to come through for Darin when he needs it most? Election Day is just four days away. **FROM THE TEAM**

We can rebuild Delaware's infrastructure, create good jobs, and protect taxpayer dollars.

Last year, Governor Carney passed the largest infrastructure plan in Delaware history - to build new schools, fix roads and bridges, fund new affordable housing, rebuild clean water infrastructure, and make new investments in Delaware's colleges and universities.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We can't lose Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
The GOP are going all out to defeat my friend Gary Peters in Michigan.
Mitch McConnell and President Trump know that if they turn this seat red, it will be nearly impossible for Democrats to win enough seats to elect a Democratic majority in the Senate.
**[Republicans are throwing everything they've got at Gary -- can we help him fight back? Rush in a $5 contribution right now to help keep the Michigan Senate seat blue.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201030-gary-peters?refcode=em201030i_1087&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Gary took a courageous stand this week when he voted against the confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Now, the Republicans are hoping to use that vote against him.
We need folks like Gary in the Senate who will do what's right -- and won't back down from a fight for our families or values. Will you join me and support his campaign in the final stretch?
**[Pitch in $5 or any amount now to help re-elect my friend Gary Peters in Michigan.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201030-gary-peters?refcode=em201030i_1087&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201030-gary-peters?refcode=em201030i_1087&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

body:
Friend,

We are reaching the end of the road for this Presidential election. In just 3 short days, we will be hitting the polls. Are you ready?

I know I, for one, am concerned. Want to know why, Friend?

Because we are not ready for the wave of money the Democrats are sure to have crashing down when runoffs and recounts begin. They have troves of dark money from all over the country, and they're using their millions to influence voters and turn our Senate and our White House **BLUE**.

I've seen the numbers and we are not yet prepared financially for the battle that will continue after November 3rd.

name: Bill Olson
subject: Close race help me win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

Hi Peter,

I have worked hard, fought, allied myself with the President in this Florida district- and now I'm surging ahead.

But now I need your help urgently to close this deal!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg
!

This race will be close. It's a swing district that had a Republican Congressman this decade- but now has Pelosi clone Darren Soto occupying the seat!

Earlier polls had us in a dead heat:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

BUT NOW RECENT POLLING SHOWS I'VE OPENED UP A SMALL LEAD!

With just days to go before election day, we can pull this upset off- but I need your help desperately!

Why am I surging? Because I've exposed Soto as attached to the hip to Nancy Pelosi!

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

This race will revolve around turnout of Trump voters. If Trump wins my district, I will too. Our country needs the President- and needs me to beat Soto so that we don't have Pelosi as Speaker anymore!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. I need your help most urgently to push me over the top! Join my 4,000 patriots who are helping me flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

Trump is fighting for Florida. My district is a key area he's focusing on- and together we can win! Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. That's why I need your help!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the Marxist Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7i1MsU84F6OuRU&b=5GUzJ1kZ.12ooYG0ch_EEg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

subject: MEDIA ADVISORY: KELLY LOEFFLER ANNOUNCES ﻿STATEWIDE FLY-AROUND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, OCTOBER 31, 2020
MEDIA ADVISORY: KELLY LOEFFLER ANNOUNCES STATEWIDE FLY-AROUND
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released the following schedule for her upcoming statewide fly-around tour on Monday and Tuesday of next week. At each stop, Senator Loeffler will deliver brief remarks, after which she will be available for questions. Media must RSVP to caitlin@kellyforsenate.com by 8:00 PM on Sunday, November 1 to attend.
MONDAY, NOVEMBER 2
Gwinnett County Stop 9:00 AM [Gwinnett Aero Maintenance](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001se2FTrEboY7q7r_B97RPpbIUfyDaXHyW5E0Wm6rpimCWDRxjFtRZyMYz_2BGoRi7qP58Xy-iz96ogV_PX-ZY0GD_76XztvDWNvRaPT6kMgJ4BYa2yPaFcpJ_99JYNBftN-0ZMBRwOrLlvwKvB4U1onPaCWRyO06bD1tlacYFG2Zv5pZM9dPhmQ==&c=Nt56AHw2ALyFg6nMv76VCmUaflzbTb7Pzfix8eeHGPA_TikpoFSiQQ==&ch=aEIlyOa3MFYNAOgZGoBLnPZwbaqofQacuzLvNQWylLoUlIDkMG03oA==) 850 Airport Rd, Lawrenceville, GA 30046
Richmond County Stop 10:30 AM Augusta Regional Airport 1501 Aviation Way, Augusta, GA 30906
Chatham County Stop 12:00 PM Sheltair Aviation 100 Eddie Jungemann Dr, Savannah, GA 31408
Houston County Stop 1:30 PM Perry-Houston County Airport 200 Myrtle Field Rd, Perry, GA 31069

TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 3
Cobb County Stop 9:00 AM Cobb County International Airport 1723 McCollum Pkwy NW, Kennesaw, GA 30144
Dougherty County Stop 10:30 AM Southwest Georgia Regional Airport 3905 Newton Rd #100, Albany, GA 31701
Muscogee County Stop 12:00 PM Columbus Airport 3250 W Britt David Rd, Columbus, GA 31909
Whitfield County Stop 2:30 PM Dalton Municipal Airport 4485 Airport Rd SE, Dalton, GA 30721
Hall County Stop 4:00 PM Lee Gilmer Memorial Airport 1137 Aviation Way, Gainesville, GA 30501
---
| ### Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary 770-876-1696 caitlin@kellyforsenate.com

subject: If you're able to make a contribution today, could you chip in right now to help hit our goal before tonight's final grassroots fundraising deadline and help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We missed our fundraising target on Wednesday. We made up some ground Thursday and Friday thanks to grassroots donors, but we still need a big response today to make sure we hit Elizabeth's goal befor | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525111/45c30650/1c79c3126/66eb584f/2681902329/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

We missed our fundraising target on Wednesday. We made up some ground Thursday and Friday thanks to grassroots donors, but we still need a big response today to make sure we hit Elizabeth's goal before the midnight fundraising deadline.

If you've been waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to Warren Democrats and own a piece of this grassroots movement, this is it.

**[If you're able to make a contribution today, could you chip in right now to help hit our goal before tonight's final grassroots fundraising deadline and help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525111/45c30650/1c79c3126/66eb584e/2681902329/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjJGX0VPTV9FV0RfQ18yMDIwMTAzMV9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW22F_EOM_EWD_C_20201031_V1S3_P")**

This is our final grassroots fundraising deadline of the election. This year has been strong so far, and we have a chance to use these last few donations to help progressive Democrats up and down the ballot in competitive races.

But we have to pick up the pace today to hit our target and make our final Get-Out-The-Vote plan a success.

**$2 or anything you can contribute today will make a huge impact -- and your donation will be invested to help elect progressive Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot. **

**[If you're able to, please make your first donation today to help close the gap and power our organizing efforts to help elect Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525111/45c30650/1c79c3126/66eb584e/2681902329/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjJGX0VPTV9FV0RfQ18yMDIwMTAzMV9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW22F_EOM_EWD_C_20201031_V1S3_P")**

Thanks,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525111/45c30650/1c79c3126/66eb584e/2681902329/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjJGX0VPTV9FV0RfQ18yMDIwMTAzMV9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW22F_EOM_EWD_C_20201031_V1S3_P")
