name: Betsy
subject: There's still time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
With 3 days left until Election Day, I'll keep this short. The facts are:
* The polling shows that if we get out message out, we win
* Lake County in this District is being called Ohio's bellwether - if we run strong, Joe Biden wins
* Republicans know this and they're terrified, which is why the RSCC spent over half a million dollars helping my opponent (the most of any race in Ohio)

There's still time to fight the lying attack ads and get the truth to voters. We can still make digital and t.v. buys and expand our GOTV program before everyone has gone to the polls. Without corporate PACs, I rely on grassroots supporters like you. **[If you can, please chip in one more time at $10, $25, $100, whatever you are able to help us make a difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/rOUAgIeHAc1mKYu01QGYe8m0NXANP4foMKYufSq-keo=?refcode=10.31)** It will be a close race and every vote will make the difference, so your donation matters and could help us get the crucial last votes we need to win. Thanks for all your support Sincerely, _P.S. And here's his latest lie ↓_ _↓_ _↓ (Yesterday voters received a new mail piece attacking me and asking them to "RE-ELECT" him to State Senate. But he is not IN the State Senate and never has been!)_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/v-vNKPjKVeiM-fmpdwSDcODfQ4lg7kOs4ynoDXLGWPM=?refcode=10.31&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/v-vNKPjKVeiM-fmpdwSDcODfQ4lg7kOs4ynoDXLGWPM=?refcode=10.31&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/v-vNKPjKVeiM-fmpdwSDcODfQ4lg7kOs4ynoDXLGWPM=?refcode=10.31&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/v-vNKPjKVeiM-fmpdwSDcODfQ4lg7kOs4ynoDXLGWPM=?refcode=10.31&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/v-vNKPjKVeiM-fmpdwSDcODfQ4lg7kOs4ynoDXLGWPM=?refcode=10.31) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/yuueq2e0IN8_3HAxQPvCIHWGytE7RIIOU9FF2-rbXUQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/oc6L48ofM7JnIjIqirG8TU1UJRhgAW3Gs02cOHH1aX8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/8YbGjzJv1yYQfr8gXA7yRx_l3_wZQZ1vGUIq3vv91k4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrIXhLIdEwoz0DaZjU2NAE-fV7TNPcN1h8oANOlj6nc=/hZ9RIWUSPa9vdb58vLVZdfu53aIabqQ2W21dsBrAiBk=)

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Corky's Commitments, our new ad, how help out on Election Day, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/fd15716b586b29f4c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/666a26a1e1ac3e02c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky’s 10 Commitments Focus on Individual Liberty and Economic Freedom, and His Pledge to Work for the People of New Hampshire**
Today, Corky offered Granite Staters 10 commitments, related to individual liberty, economic freedom, national security and more of our shared concerns.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/4016216e8660bb8ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
_**Corky’s Commitments**_

I commit to sponsoring legislation to assist our nation’s economic recovery through a reduction of federal taxes on small businesses.

I commit to protecting our National Security, by strengthening our borders and enforcing immigration laws, and ensuring we have a strong, well-funded military.

I commit to reducing all unnecessary government rules and regulations to help spark an “American Made” revolution and unleash the power of our national economy.

I commit to addressing the national debt by supporting saving measures like the “Penny Plan” and a Balanced Budget Amendment.

I commit to supporting legislation that will ensure America remains energy independent, protecting the environment while keeping our businesses strong and prosperous.

I commit to sponsoring common-sense healthcare reforms while protecting pre-existing conditions, Medicare for seniors and the Veterans Administration health system.

I commit to standing up to attacks on our Constitutional liberties, especially attempts to weaken our First and Second Amendment rights.

I commit to working to amend the Constitution to establish term limits for all members of Congress which will end the politics of powerful insiders and special interests. I commit to serving only two terms, if elected.

I commit to vote for legislation that reduces duplication in Federal Government agencies/programs and wherever possible return the power to local and state governments.

I commit to returning to New Hampshire at every opportunity, and not becoming part of the establishment culture in Washington, D.C.
|
---
**Complaint Withdrawn Related to Messner Foundation, as Corky Blasts Democrats’ ‘Political Hit Job’**
The complaint filed in August by Democrat operatives targeting Corky’s scholarship foundation has been withdrawn.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/d778c2fbb41b378bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky blames his opponent, Senator Jeanne Shaheen, her campaign, and Democrat supporters for smearing his name and the Messner Foundation “to score political points and destroy my reputation and my campaign. This was a political hit job, plain and simple.”

He noted an independent audit found no wrongdoing on the part of the Messner Foundation, which provides scholarships to deserving students.

“The withdrawal of the complaint finally puts an end to the innuendo and insinuations about the Messner Foundation,” says Corky. “Jeanne Shaheen is not interested in debating the issues with her opponent. Instead, she uses her money and her influence to convince supporters to use any means necessary – including colluding with the media – to gain an advantage over a political rival.” **[Read more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/4b1b74be0a6ea799c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**Says One Thing, Does Another**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/a6abf7f8bd8ee4e2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Our **[latest TV ad](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/652b986e84dcbdadc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** pretty much sums it up – DC Jeanne Shaheen says one thing and does another. Washington is broken and it’s time for a change – it’s time to retire this career politician.
|
---
**New Hampshire Veterans and Military Parents Send Strong Message to Senator Shaheen**
A group of New Hampshire veterans and the parents of those in uniform this past week sent a strongly-worded letter to U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen opposing her recent statement that the loss of American lives in Syria represented “a minor cost.”
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/2e58d26683a10edac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky joined 78 Granite Staters signing the letter, which reads, in part: “The loss of even one American life is not ‘a minor cost’ as military parents and veterans in New Hampshire and those across the nation know all too well. Your rash statement...was outrageous and disrespectful to our troops and their parents, and anyone who has ever served in uniform.”

**[Click here to read the letter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/0d5b53f1f9d38c3fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**In The News**
This week, Corky spoke to Jack Heath on his new Good Morning, New Hampshire show on Binnie Media. He and Jack spoke about the final days of the campaign and what lies ahead. **[Click here to listen to their conversation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/23b3232822a2bf3cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**. He also gave his “Closing Argument” on New Hampshire Public Radio, focusing on his positions and how he will work to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate. **[Click here to listen in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/3d1d6e55ca8f0f75c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**Corky Applauds Confirmation of Judge Barrett to Supreme Court as Senator Shaheen Once Again Toes the Party Line**
Corky welcomed news of the Senate’s confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, while painting incumbent Jeanne Shaheen’s ‘no’ as pure politics.
“Judge Barrett’s experience and exemplary record as a jurist will make her an outstanding Associate Justice, yet Jeanne Shaheen never considered her qualifications, didn’t meet with her, and announced even before the confirmation hearings she would vote no,” says Corky. “She cast that vote at the bidding of her party leadership because President Trump had the audacity to fulfill his Constitutional obligation to fill a court vacancy.

“She also remained silent as members of her party threatened retaliation, alluding to “consequences’ if Senators did their duty by voting on a qualified nominee. That is outrageous and beneath the dignity and decorum we expect of the United States Senate.”

Corky adds: “This is what we can expect from our Senator, a career politician who is beholden to her party and special interests, and dismisses what the majority of Granite Staters and the American people believe: that Judge Barrett rightly deserved nomination and confirmation to the highest court in the land.”
|
---
**WE NEED YOU!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9de20e8c63d56444/57d7d4d6f460d498c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

|

**What a Ride It’s Been!**
Corky’s traveled the state throughout these past months, and he’s been honored to meet so many Granite Staters with inspiring stories to tell. Folks have been warm and welcoming, and Corky is humbled by the support and good wishes from voters in every corner of New Hampshire. Here are a few of his latest stops.

Conservative. | | Corky’s 10 Commitments Focus on Individual Liberty and Economic Freedom, and His Pledge to Work for the People of New Hampshire Today, Corky offered Granite Staters 10 commitments, related to individual liberty, economic freedom, national security and more of our shared concerns. Corky’s Commitments I commit to sponsoring legislation to assist our nation’s economic recovery through a reduction of federal taxes on small businesses. I commit to protecting our National Security, by strengthening our borders and enforcing immigration laws, and ensuring we have a strong, well-funded military. I commit to reducing all unnecessary government rules and regulations to help spark an “American Made” revolution and unleash the power of our national economy. I commit to addressing the national debt by supporting saving measures like the “Penny Plan” and a Balanced Budget Amendment. I commit to supporting legislation that will ensure America remains energy independent, protecting the environment while keeping our businesses strong and prosperous. I commit to sponsoring common-sense healthcare reforms while protecting pre-existing conditions, Medicare for seniors and the Veterans Administration health system. I commit to standing up to attacks on our Constitutional liberties, especially attempts to weaken our First and Second Amendment rights. I commit to working to amend the Constitution to establish term limits for all members of Congress which will end the politics of powerful insiders and special interests. I commit to serving only two terms, if elected. I commit to vote for legislation that reduces duplication in Federal Government agencies/programs and wherever possible return the power to local and state governments. body:
On October 25th, the Marine Corps base at Parris Island celebrated its 105th birthday. The rich history of Parris Island — the place where ‘Marines... | |

[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b020d930e35d47b4a57ef399b555ae53&_e=fNdn9o8zEQxDkzGNHb-Aux9k3bpH6-erP_zDQZrAQA2s_hypJ7KxlSuZ4lObu2hwirqU54frLHIeUL7uRHG25p8IzJhwgOq-hCHdleDLDOhpbDbqLrH8XegjcklrJTpEJ4Wp9dur_uO4Aiq3JnpSzyNxHOnzdWpVnA9Ilym-jFr8UcYSzo4TkKRPNAkdubkb8hU3MjS8Te6sGrflI2j4mGUWpiCCJX-tfdgXFFBrFp4jvbqbxyzFjMPr4RfI_T-VyfiRn2BZQAyaAmru2grqENDPej1DXuGwX7Y5YXL8OANNrHuFFNMSlToAaHZPZhgBnvxJpWLeme6BvKir0W_pA4SWGYVbt1qOk7OslSBcV8LRLa1iaaOlgl8TF56Oblm6kUwpyqtEZjZB4tcqpwR9OkjWaiEPlyDOSfVMGgkt-Y8DJjZ1kv4hk81YSAogbnu4Qw8JyWru83idTOeSjjJwEAMGP0fyDBkDV-OGVTPgrRU%3D)
Friend,

On October 25th, the Marine Corps base at Parris Island celebrated its 105th birthday.

**The rich history of Parris Island — the place where ‘Marines are made’ — was on full display, and so were the qualities that make it special. **

_“Everyone knows that there is this thing about Parris Island. It’s the same training that recruits get in (Marine Corps Recruit Depot) San Diego, but it’s this mystique ‘ahh you went to Parris Island.” - Ed Nevgloski, director of the Marine Corps history division_

Unfortunately, this year’s anniversary was colored by the uncertain future of the legendary base. Its very existence is being threatened by liberal agenda items, and right now, our district has a representative who chose to put it on the chopping block.
[**Join Nancy and Save Parris Island**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b020d930e35d47b4a57ef399b555ae53&_e=fNdn9o8zEQxDkzGNHb-Aux9k3bpH6-erP_zDQZrAQA2s_hypJ7KxlSuZ4lObu2hwirqU54frLHIeUL7uRHG25p8IzJhwgOq-hCHdleDLDOhpbDbqLrH8XegjcklrJTpEJ4Wp9dur_uO4Aiq3JnpSzyNxHOnzdWpVnA9Ilym-jFr8UcYSzo4TkKRPNAkdubkb8hU3MjS8Te6sGrflI2j4mGUWpiCCJX-tfdgXFFBrFp4jvbqbxyzFjMPr4RfI_T-VyfiRn2BZQAyaAmru2grqENoId0MKLU7B7qJhkQU2W6T3HPg5BY7za3Hr_gAEufpUvu9ytEsq_1nZkK2Elh32vOqSrBbzedYwySBsKDnGPXEu3iWHMhwarWhojiWSP0BESfCicXmJ6zKGXEXxuMlre1rKA53OQwJFXenwt70bITTo1r42n8E8jXetfC8jEno29lKv8EY2jj6pPiNw2n2NswY5W8fiO_Eo05qPBk__IUw%3D)
Democrat Joe Cunningham voted for an amendment that put Parris Island on the chopping block. When people found out about his vote, he tried to spin his mistake into support for Parris Island — even jumping to sign a bill that his Republican colleagues only had to pass because of his mistake.

**He’s supposed to be in Congress to fight for the Lowcountry’s priorities, not Nancy Pelosi’s. **

Parris Island has been taking our young men and making them Marines for more than a century.

**It is an absolutely essential part of our national defense ecosystem, and a building block of the Lowcountry’s economy — providing nearly 6,000 jobs and an economic impact of $700 million. **

Friend, it’s simple.

We cannot let this legendary Marine installation fall victim to Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agenda. That’s why Nancy has led the fight to save it — gathering conservative politicians and former Marines from across the state to stand against this attack on our economy and military heritage.

Will you join Nancy in fighting to save Parris Island? Add your name below.
[**Join Nancy and Save Parris Island**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b020d930e35d47b4a57ef399b555ae53&_e=fNdn9o8zEQxDkzGNHb-Aux9k3bpH6-erP_zDQZrAQA2s_hypJ7KxlSuZ4lObu2hwirqU54frLHIeUL7uRHG25p8IzJhwgOq-hCHdleDLDOhpbDbqLrH8XegjcklrJTpEJ4Wp9dur_uO4Aiq3JnpSzyNxHOnzdWpVnA9Ilym-jFr8UcYSzo4TkKRPNAkdubkb8hU3MjS8Te6sGrflI2j4mGUWpiCCJX-tfdgXFFBrFp4jvbqbxyzFjMPr4RfI_T-VyfiRn2BZQAyaAmru2grqEIYTApjYQvqEDCFs1XLxqzQZeBaqw17fJQzw7BwPbFFplYVZ22NmBK0UsKq_xnxPp3E3s1A5__GBapPBXTQ_Fj4KHErokiGnr89QtWcSleiVrctWnW2mb4FjVmstovtoRdkLQ9ai6H-eXMOXHDH97pUPdFr4o2Gyq3pl2yeC0McB4wJRTimmKzPGAtJL8k1X0lpwlh-d9damlvAdvRh19jo%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Team Mace

He’s supposed to be in Congress to fight for the Lowcountry’s priorities, not Nancy Pelosi’s. Parris Island has been taking our young men and making them Marines for more than a century. It is an absolutely essential part of our national defense ecosystem, and a building block of the Lowcountry’s economy — providing nearly 6,000 jobs and an economic impact of $700 million. Friend, it’s simple. We cannot let this legendary Marine installation fall victim to Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agenda. That’s why Nancy has led the fight to save it — gathering conservative politicians and former Marines from across the state to stand against this attack on our economy and military heritage. Will you join Nancy in fighting to save Parris Island? Add your name below. Thank you for your support, Team Mace | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Liz Olson
subject: Will Minnesota be a battleground?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9nXGhWGpMKN1JYIDhtDrHNLcJ4o0HGNBf-LRK5lHX68=/pf0zrwAFyhQCUihTsBHkg6GFL3F9SdgOQ8xxy-3TYgI=?refcode=103120-2)
| | Friend, I spent many years as an organizer before I ran for office the first time. Organizing and campaigning are in my blood - that's why this time of year is so exciting for me. Like you, I've seen a lot of speculation that Minnesota is a battleground state. In the House, we know that the state legislature is the foundation we build on for Democratic victories up and down the ballot. In short, the work we do is really important for the direction of our state and country. Will Minnesota end up being a battleground when the votes come in on Tuesday? I don't really know. What I do know is:
* House DFLers have organized stronger and smarter than any campaign I've seen before.
* Our candidates are some of the best we've ever had.
* We're competitive in areas the DFL has never been competitive in its entire history.

This is all good news for DFLers across the state and up and down the ballot heading into Election Day. Today, I am asking you one last time for this campaign: can you make a contribution to our caucus? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9nXGhWGpMKN1JYIDhtDrHNLcJ4o0HGNBf-LRK5lHX68=/pf0zrwAFyhQCUihTsBHkg6GFL3F9SdgOQ8xxy-3TYgI=?refcode=103120-2) I am so proud of our campaign and of the work we've been able to accomplish together. We're not done yet. Help us make it across the finish line and elect Democrats across the state. Thank you for all your support this cycle, Rep. Liz Olson Majority Whip Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9nXGhWGpMKN1JYIDhtDrHNLcJ4o0HGNBf-LRK5lHX68=/pf0zrwAFyhQCUihTsBHkg6GFL3F9SdgOQ8xxy-3TYgI=?refcode=103120-2)

name: Team Warner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here's how we ensure a blue wave in Virginia.
|
---

| |
Derek --

Here's our plan to make sure Virginia is blue all the way down the ballot: **_we have to turn out as many voters as possible._**

We know, Derek, it seems like common sense. But it's so important that we don't let momentum lag in this homestretch, which is why we're reaching out today.

**Your donation to our GOTV efforts in the final stretch will help re-elect Mark Warner,_and_ flip more districts in the Commonwealth. [Can we count on you?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c0/53d9897e/551f449e/1c88cf89/3954945486/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-boost-down?refcode=20201031_f_2_nd__935__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

High turnout and strong support for Mark Warner's race doesn't just help this campaign -- we expect it'll help elect Joe Biden and boost down-ballot Virginia Democrats who are running in close races. And with so much at stake in this election, we're not willing to leave anything to chance.

Here's how this has happened in Virginia in the past: when Senator Tim Kaine won re-election in 2018, he won seven out of VA's 11 congressional districts. Democratic congressional candidates also won in those seven districts, but they _fell short_ in the districts that Senator Kaine lost.

If Mark wins his race by a large enough margin, he can help boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up districts.

[**Can you help us bring a blue wave to Virginia?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c0/53d9897e/551f449e/1c88cf88/3954945486/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-boost-down?refcode=20201031_f_2_nd__935__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c0/53d9897e/551f449e/1c88cff7/3954945486/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-boost-down?refcode=20201031_f_2_nd__935__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cb/77d4c309/222672cc/26358c2c/3594758489/VEsEBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. clean_body: Peter, if you read nothing else, read this. | | | "" This email is long, but it is important to me to share 3 facts Trump desperately doesn't want you to know and explain why I need to raise $15,680 in the next 10 hours. "" I'm in the LEAD and my district could DECIDE the 2020 Presidential race. "" I'm on the brink of unseating a vulnerable GOP Congressman AND scoring a decisive Electoral College victory for Democrats. The GOP is panicking and dark money groups are pummeling me with $2.2 million in attack ads. "" | | "" "" Trump is terrified and pulling out all the stops to beat me. Trump flew into our district to throw rallies, boost enthusiasm and turnout conservative voters. I won't lie, Peter: These schemes led to Trump's victory in 2016, and they could do it again. Our only chance of making their plan BACKFIRE hinges on ramping up our voter outreach immediately. "" | "" "" All eyes are on this race and just a handful of votes could tip the scales. [FiveThirtyEight: NE-02 is a DECIDING FACTOR in the 2020 Presidential race The New York Times: The presidential election could be decided by an unlikely spot: Nebraska's Second Congressional District The Washington Post: Don Bacon admits: "This [NE-02] could be the tie-breaking vote"]( "") "" We cannot take a single vote for granted, especially in these final 3 days. I know that if we act NOW, we can pull this off and deliver a historic victory for Democrats. But only if we have the resources to fight until the bitter end. ""** | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for being in this fight with me, Kara | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. subject: UPDATE: We've almost met out goal - can you help?

body:
|

| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| A couple of days ago, we set out to raise $5000 before Election Day to put towards reaching undecided voters, and the people of the Fourth District have delivered – we’re only $410 away from meeting our mark after only four days!
---
| [Click here to chip in!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=143281b327&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in!")
---
| At this stage of the race, every day is a battle. We’re trying to reach every persuadable voter in the district, but we’re fighting against a surge of money from out-of-state donors, so every dollar we can raise is critical to winning as we close out the race. We’re so close to meeting our goal and delivering a win on Tuesday – can you chip in $10 or $20 to help us get there?

| Thank you for your help!

Matt Leopold

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: I know it’s late, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
I need your help tonight. I’ve been on and off the phone all day trying to organize our GOTV efforts, and my last phone call was about our finances.

|
---
Hey folks, I know it’s a bit late on Saturday, but I need your help tonight. I’ve been on and off the phone all day trying to organize our GOTV efforts, and my last phone call was about our finances. We need just $471 more to hit our last end-of-month fundraising goal. This will be used to pay gas, coffee, and the like for our volunteers and staff working around the clock to get out the vote. So, if you can, I’ve included a link below to chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us out. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/RK_GOTV](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21040586/259338244/1282836671?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201031EOM7_RK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmYyNzE5NC1kZDFiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8HlS-KiZ_Lsn7GBd2xN7k7s0Cty5F1ZkRBLfGbAyU8=) Thank you! -Rick | | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress

You may know me for my accomplishments on the football field, but I'm also a concerned American who wants the best for our country and our future. **[That is why I'm asking you to join me in supporting Senator Lindsey Graham!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=363d847a153b4539ac1772d4bfcdb2b9&_e=GyJuZYXJkF6ux9s_Bp6GWD-SL6gmrn3yH-Qmfz80Y1DWak5GY8dbo6iRNvcbE13N1gHB_Al_s4QDounXw3K6sKQejOgPcLT0ByiOsQnUxyrFOGo3E8xG-XTq-ulP6VU8ojP7agZp4hj1fWyvRm_wy9XaNuwjn4IOaUQv1ljVIqJA3Q744CzD8vUyR0F5tlO45mgIJhBfYZSJD0xZCJ8U_TJfs4VzEi4S4t2nvtx3W35Yl0dUZOrLITEDwqJ3z4_0_BrkjzGGhGbd7eGYERK9JaJBieJ6HPjgM2Kyo5rkZz0LagPh2t26A28Zzz6fFIpMht82Fp1hF1WtJ3s15bRJI3zEen01E52IxP3_FReFxAasuW-JxFBhjV1DkUkfCS7fRL6xlskExCDDqR94BfqhvQ%3D%3D)**

Senator Graham is fighting tirelessly in the final hours of this campaign. He's fighting to confirm conservative judges. He's fighting to protect our shared American values. He's fighting to advance our conservative agenda. _**Fellow American, he's fighting for you!**_

# Sprint to the Finish
With just hours left in this campaign we are working overtime to ensure we win this race. We are on the phones talking with voters, placing ads on Social Media, and broadcasting our message across the state on radio.

This team is sprinting to the finish line and we need your help. We aren't the only ones working long days. The Democrats are fighting hard to win this race.

We need your help if we're going to keep the Auditors office in Republican hands. Please consider pitching in $20 dollars to keep our ads going in the final three and a half days.

Many Montanans are waiting until the last second to vote. We need to be able to share our message until 8:00pm on Tuesday.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Wesley Hunt and Congressman McCaul's Get Out The Vote Rally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

On the eve of Election Day, Wesley Hunt and Congressman Michael McCaul will hold a rally to energize voters and encourage them to go vote on November 3rd.

We invite you to join Wesley and Congressman McCaul on Monday to ensure we get as many voters to the polls as possible on Election Day!

_**Where**_ : Katy Park, 24927 Morton Rd.
_**When**_ : Monday, November 2nd at 5:30pm
_**Who**_ : Wesley Hunt, Congressman Michael McCaul, and voters from across Houston

We have the opportunity to bring positive change to Houston, but to do so we need to elect the right leaders to defend our interests in Washington. Don't miss this opportunity to rally members of our community and Get Out The Vote!

If you would like to attend or have any questions, please email info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=88b7bfcc9ffe40f68e277efb2c901f2b&_e=I463YiSNGuADux6drRXJISTKfcay9HYAD-OiLs-rC1EG9LkOcTxKT1tLh9YA-rnq4kqIF4GcVp1myll62dpsqCtlatRnb15AHyZenCXFNsDQLcA0mnmAa02tHOlFchbOqhDcJVvyi9l6G_wVgf0wD-yBEWCwx890609gX0vC6hovpJtXxTlJNvTYfdgodS46hA_M_JvZIXSkjRZ4-0L7XiKYkLhyoweLcapoh2_PdL_ECnwz2LtK0HN5QHkjJpZyoqsuHOl1vyEh2LjAzZrSiP9rXYYZ2VAU8KtZyYtW7YQ%3D)****

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The last last call before our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Don't let the ghouls and goblins become reality.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x) Friend, Today might be all about ghouls and goblins -- but the real nightmare could be just a few days away. The end of this election is in just three days. If we lose, no scary story will top the real one we're about to face: Donald Trump's rhetoric has won. Even here in Washington state, right-wing extremism has taken hold, and there's no way out. **But there is a way out: We vote. We can't let fear take control -- we can still act to build a better future.** **Our FINAL deadline is at midnight TONIGHT, and a donation right now is an investment in the fight against hate and division and for hope and progress.[Donate $5 or more right now before our FINAL fundraising deadline of this election.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13610?t=4&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13611?t=5&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13612?t=6&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13613?t=7&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13614?t=8&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13615?t=9&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13610?t=10&akid=8218%2E868730%2ExQi99x)
---
I hope we're about to leave the real-life fear behind for good. But we'll only do it if we invest in something better, right now. Thanks for believing in that -- I know I still do.
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Carole King
subject: MJ is counting on us, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to send her to the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dcb/7f51f7bc/59d433f3/4efb11e5/3662281971/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

First of all, I hope you and your family are doing well. If you're suffering from loss or economic hardship, my heart goes out to you.

**I'm reaching out because Senator John Cornyn is failing Texans _and_ the American people.**

MJ Hegar is a combat veteran from Texas who was awarded a Purple Heart. She's a working mom with two kids. And she's a proven leader. When she was flying one of many search and rescue missions in Afghanistan, even after her chopper was shot down and she was wounded, she strapped herself to the skids of the rescue helicopter, protected her crew, and completed her mission.

**[Will you give $10 or whatever you can afford to elect MJ Hegar to the U.S. Senate??](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dcb/7f51f7bc/59d433f3/4efb11e4/3662281971/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201031.3nd__2452__&amount=10")**

Peter, it's been _SIX MONTHS_ since the Senate passed any COVID-19 relief to help essential workers and American families! The House passed a COVID-19 relief bill months ago, but Republican Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refused to even hold a vote on it. And John Cornyn backed him up, saying that there was "no urgency" to pass more relief.

**No urgency?? Those are the words of a Senator turning his back on thousands of his constituents in desperate need of relief.**

After helping McConnell ram through a Supreme Court Justice, Cornyn left Washington without doing squat for families, frontline and essential workers, nor for small businesses going under in a dire economic crisis.

**[MJ Hegar is capable and EAGER to serve the people of Texas!
